items.text:
Pacific Producers Group & Vancouver Virtual Productions are casting for a 30-second and 15-second TV commercial to be filmed on April 16th in Coquitlam.

**3-4 Year Old Girl (female, 3-5 years old, Caucasian)**
* Positive, energetic, excitable, a winning smile
* Her character is wearing a full bathing suit, wrapped up in a towel over top, and is putting one foot in and out of a small kid-sized inflatable pool in the summer.

**ADDITIONAL DETAILS**
* Compensation: 1x30-sec ad - $750, agency fee included.
* Rights & Terms: a complete buyout for all media in perpetuity
* This is a non-union shoot (no royalties/residuals) and shooting will require a day of the talent’s time – we estimate a 2 to 4 hour day for talent
* Character has no dialogue
* We will be focused on naturalness, energy, and connection to other characters (mom)
* Lunch/food will be provided
* Filming will be indoors, in a studio
* The TV ad is for an outdoor living product, and the script is family-oriented
* Talent will provide their own basic wardrobe, but some character-specific wardrobe items may be supplied by production
* A wardrobe allowance will be added for any personal items used ($25 for basic wardrobe outfit, plus $5 for each additional item)

**AUDITION MATERIAL**

If interested, please email a headshot and resume to duramarket@duradek.com .

You’re also welcome to submit any web links to an online reel, demo, or portfolio of past work. However, we are specifically seeking audition material; these can be self-filmed on a phone or iPhone – with the following requested audition material:

We’d love to see this young actress in playful situations – skipping

rope or playing hopscotch or balancing on one leg, enjoying themselves and laughing.

topComments.text: On lunch break I will email my younger daughter’s resume and headshots! She is a fish in water absolutely loves it can dive down in deep water so totally comfortable around water!

**CASTING CALL FOR VARIOUS ROLES for Kids and Parents Casting--** (can be authentic parent/child OR we cast two roles separately.). **SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA BASED ONLY.**

For a Live fundraising event honoring Meyer Luskin and the Luskin OIC (Orthopedic Institute for Children. Philanthropist Meyer Luskin recently turned 100 years old and we're holding a special event for his medical facility.

Mom: Age between 30-50: Rate: $650. Speaking.

Son: Age between 8-16: Rate: $450. Non speaking, but heavily featured, should have great facial expressions. Will be playing the role of a young Meyer Luskin.

Featured Background: Dads between ages 30-45. Rate: $500

Son: between ages 8-12. $400

Background families: Mixed ethnicities and ages: $300 each. Need to cast 10 people- a mixed of families.

The event is happening in Manhattan Beach and/or Culver City on **SATURDAY** June 6, 2026.

6-8 hour day on location.

Please submit information to: info@real2reelcasting.com

More about previous Luskin events:

items.text:
Calling All Women- Strut Don’t Stress!
“Feel Like A Woman-Walk Like A Boss”is a transformative workshop created to uplift, empower, and celebrate women over 40—honoring the strength, wisdom, and confidence that come with life’s experiences. This space is designed to inspire you to embrace who you are today, step fully into your power, and move forward with grace, purpose, and self-assurance.

No matter your journey or background, you’ll be encouraged to trust your instincts, own your voice, and take each step boldly and unapologetically. This is your time to rediscover your spark, redefine your path, and walk with the confidence of a woman who knows her worth and isn’t afraid to now show it.

Tickets On Eventbrite 
Sunday 26th April 
Time: 1:00pm- 2:30pm 
Cost: £15:00 +bf £1:69

#ontherunwayoflife #walkyourwalk 
#msmg👠👠  #themodelworkshopslondon 
#notjustmodels

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.summary:
Calling All Women- Strut Don’t Stress!
“Feel Like A Woman-Walk Like A Boss”is a transformative workshop created to uplift, empower, and celebrate women over 40—honoring the strength, wisdom, and confidence that come with life’s experiences. This space is designed to inspire you to embrace who you are today, step fully into your power, and move forward with grace, purpose, and self-assurance.

No matter your journey or background, you’ll be encouraged to trust your instincts, own your voice, and take each step boldly and unapologetically. This is your time to rediscover your spark, redefine your path, and walk with the confidence of a woman who knows her worth and isn’t afraid to now show it.

Tickets On Eventbrite 
Sunday 26th April 
Time: 1:00pm- 2:30pm 
Cost: £15:00 +bf £1:69

#ontherunwayoflife #walkyourwalk 
#msmg👠👠  #themodelworkshopslondon 
#notjustmodels
items.title: Calling All Women- Strut Don’t Stress!

looking for talented UGC Creators for an exciting paid product promotion! 📸✨
Requirements:
 * Audience: Minimum 20k+ followers
 * Location: Must be based in the UK 🇬🇧

 * Free products for the shoot

sharedPost.text:
@everyone**CASTING CALL**
We at Ember Production are looking for some SA’s the next shooting day for The Eight Saga: NEST Project in on Saturday the 25th of April and filming in Ambleside in the Lake District.

  This is a one day shoot and we are looking for the following-

1 x Barmen 50’s +

25 x Farmer Boys and a few Farmer Girls any age 

These are non speaking roles and IMDb credits are given and a massive opportunity to be given lots of time in front on the camera to be part of this amazing project.

  To all that are interested please send me a message on my WhatsApp on 07894943405 with your full name, age, email address & headshot please 🙏🏼 

If you have your own costume, even better! Best costume wins ;)

P.s it can just be a picture that you have taken on your phone with no hats or shades on please 🙏🏼 

We are very excited for having you on board and working with you 🫶🏼🫶🏼

  Below is the trailer for this feature film 🎥🎥🎬🎬🔥

sharedPost.text:
Lilli Marleen“ 🌹– ein Lied, das Generationen berührt hat und bis heute unter die Haut geht.
Mit meiner ganz persönlichen Interpretation verleihe ich diesem zeitlosen Klassiker eine neue Seele.

Sanfte Klänge der Panflöte, getragen vom warmen Atem des Akkordeons, lassen die Melodie in einem neuen Licht erscheinen – ruhig, gefühlvoll und voller Erinnerung.

Diese Version ist keine Kopie, sondern eine Hommage…
Ein musikalischer Moment zwischen Vergangenheit und Gefühl – neu erzählt 
von PAN HOPE.

Ab 17.04.25  überall in allen Streams 
 #musik ,
#cover

items.text:
Ich habe heute wieder ma' so eine Nachricht von einem Mann bekommen, den ich nur einmal gesehen habe 🙈 

Vll wissen das die Männer nicht, aber für eine Frau könnte es gravierende  Auswirkungen auf die Psyhisch und Physische Gesundheit haben:

wenn sie ständig den Geschlechtspartner wechselt! 

Wenn nicht gleich dann später.

Denn nach der Theorie müsste die die das beruflich machen die Glücklichsten und Gesündesten Menschen ever sein?!

#mann #frau #dating #single

items.title: Ich habe heute wieder ma' so eine Nachricht von einem Mann bekommen, den ich nur einmal gesehen habe 🙈

items.text:
!!! Plus-Size Darsteller Düsseldorf gesucht !!! 

Für eine Kinofilmproduktion in Düsseldorf, Bonn, Nettetal und Umgebung wird eine sehr präsente plus-size Rolle für 15-20 Drehtage im Juli und August besetzt. 

Ich wirke bei diesem Projekt aktiv mit und möchte mit meiner Animation gezielt helfen, diese besondere Rolle sichtbar zu machen. Gesucht wird eine Schauspielerin oder ein Schauspieler, gerne plus-size, unabhängig vom Geschlecht, im Spielalter von etwa 40 bis 50 Jahren. Entscheidend ist nicht nur die Optik, sondern vor allem Präsenz, Ausstrahlung und eine starke performative Wirkung vor der Kamera. 

Gedreht wird im Zeitraum Juli bis August in Düsseldorf, Nettetal und Umgebung. Der Umfang liegt bei etwa 15 bis 20 Drehtagen. Es handelt sich um eine Low-Budget-Kinofilmproduktion, bei der diese Rolle bewusst auf Wirkung, Erscheinung und Charakter angelegt ist.  

Wenn Du selbst passen könntest oder jemanden kennst, der perfekt in dieses Profil fällt, dann teile dieses Video bitte direkt weiter. Genau solche Besetzungen entstehen oft nicht über Reichweite allein, sondern über Menschen, die den richtigen Kontakt herstellen. 

Kennst Du jemanden mit genau dieser Präsenz, der unbedingt von diesem Casting erfahren sollte? Schreib es in die Kommentare oder leite den Aufruf sofort weiter. 

Wen würdest Du aus Deinem Netzwerk sofort für diese plus-size Kinofilmrolle in Düsseldorf vorschlagen, und was macht diese Person vor der Kamera so besonders? 

Abo dalassen, Glocke aktivieren, Beitrag liken und bitte direkt weiterleiten. 

Kennst Du die richtige Person, markiere sie jetzt oder schick ihr diesen Casting-Aufruf sofort. 

Teile das Video in Deinem Netzwerk, damit diese Rolle nicht an der richtigen Person vorbeigeht. 

https://de.stagepool.com/share/255499/8594852d9dqa 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner 

#PlusSizeDarsteller #KinofilmCasting #Düsseldorf #Schauspielcasting #FilmszeneNRW

items.summary:
!!! Plus-Size Darsteller Düsseldorf gesucht !!! 

Für eine Kinofilmproduktion in Düsseldorf, Bonn, Nettetal und Umgebung wird eine sehr präsente plus-size Rolle für 15-20 Drehtage im Juli und August besetzt. 

Ich wirke bei diesem Projekt aktiv mit und möchte mit meiner Animation gezielt helfen, diese besondere Rolle sichtbar zu machen. Gesucht wird eine Schauspielerin oder ein Schauspieler, gerne plus-size, unabhängig vom Geschlecht, im Spielalter von etwa 40 bis 50 Jahren. Entscheidend ist nicht nur die Optik, sondern vor allem Präsenz, Ausstrahlung und eine starke performative Wirkung vor der Kamera. 

Gedreht wird im Zeitraum Juli bis August in Düsseldorf, Nettetal und Umgebung. Der Umfang liegt bei etwa 15 bis 20 Drehtagen. Es handelt sich um eine Low-Budget-Kinofilmproduktion, bei der diese Rolle bewusst auf Wirkung, Erscheinung und Charakter angelegt ist.  

Wenn Du selbst passen könntest oder jemanden kennst, der perfekt in dieses Profil fällt, dann teile dieses Video bitte direkt weiter. Genau solche Besetzungen entstehen oft nicht über Reichweite allein, sondern über Menschen, die den richtigen Kontakt herstellen. 

Kennst Du jemanden mit genau dieser Präsenz, der unbedingt von diesem Casting erfahren sollte? Schreib es in die Kommentare oder leite den Aufruf sofort weiter. 

Wen würdest Du aus Deinem Netzwerk sofort für diese plus-size Kinofilmrolle in Düsseldorf vorschlagen, und was macht diese Person vor der Kamera so besonders? 

Abo dalassen, Glocke aktivieren, Beitrag liken und bitte direkt weiterleiten. 

Kennst Du die richtige Person, markiere sie jetzt oder schick ihr diesen Casting-Aufruf sofort. 

Teile das Video in Deinem Netzwerk, damit diese Rolle nicht an der richtigen Person vorbeigeht. 

https://de.stagepool.com/share/255499/8594852d9dqa 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner 

#PlusSizeDarsteller #KinofilmCasting #Düsseldorf #Schauspielcasting #FilmszeneNRW

items.text:
For my bachelor graduation film at Salzburg University of Applied Sciences (FH Salzburg), I am looking for the second lead actor for the short film “Head Over Heels”.
Head Over Heels is a stylized 80s slasher short film about a complicated father-son relationship, combining classic horror with psychological tension.
CHUCK
Gender: Male
Playing age: 14–18
Role: Second lead
Language: English (American accent required)
Shooting days: Multiple days (major role)
Description
Chuck is Charles’ son and the unwilling partner in his father’s magic shows and petty thefts. Intelligent, cynical, and emotionally exhausted by their life.
He loves his father but is slowly losing respect for him. Chuck sees reality more clearly than Charles: their life is unstable, dangerous, and offers little future.
His frustration often appears as sarcasm and emotional distance. Beneath that exterior, however, is a vulnerable teenager who simply longs for stability and a normal life.
The role requires a strong emotional range, from dry irony to intense desperation.

Synopsis
Charles and his son Chuck make a living through a combination of magic shows and petty theft. When they accept an invitation to perform at a birthday party, the job initially seems harmless. However, the hosts begin to behave strangely. Soon they discover that the seemingly friendly postman they met earlier has a deeply disturbed idea of family and has chosen Charles to become his new father. What started as a simple gig turns into a deadly game.

Project Information
Title: Head Over Heels
Genre: 80s Slasher Horror
Format: Short Film / Bachelor Graduation Film
Location: Ebreichsdorf, Austria
Shooting Period: June 15 – June 21, 2026
Producer: Florian Peter
Director: Vanessa Brshanca
Language: The film will be performed in English. All actors must be fluent in English and able to perform with a convincing American accent.

items.text:
## Jurij Alschitz introduces QUANTUM PEDAGOGY for Theatre - The Actor in Superposition

World Theatre Training Institute Akt-Zent

A two-day seminar for **actors**, **directors**, and **teachers** who feel that linear thinking no longer corresponds to contemporary creative processes, and who are seeking a different way of working with knowledge, presence, and responsibility.

*For many years I have worked as a teacher and trainer, and increasingly I feel that classical models no longer explain what truly occurs between teacher, student, and the learning process itself. Quantum training is my personal field of reflection and practice — an attempt to reconsider knowledge, the lesson, training, and the responsibility of the teacher.*
*This seminar does not offer answers. It offers a change of position and an experience that each participant undergoes in their own way.*
*Dr. Jurij Alschitz*

items.text:
CASTING / WARSZAWA
Szukamy 8 postaci do sesji zdjęciowej dla gry komputerowej.

To nie jest zwykła sesja — wcielisz się w postać z gry.

Na podstawie zdjęć zostaną stworzone karty postaci z Twoją twarzą.

Zdjęcia: 1 dzień (w okresie 25–30 kwietnia)

Wynagrodzenie: 300 zł

Kogo szukamy:

— Agent <3Uroczy influencer-wampir z niepokojącą, „nieludzką” energią Kobieta, 20–25 lat, szczupła, wyrazista twarz, gotowość do mocnego makijażu i eksperymentów z włosami

— Wilhelm Hamm Współczesny szczurołap, brudny, hipnotyzujący i niebezpieczny Mężczyzna, około 30 lat, szczupły lub średniej budowy, wyrazista aparycja, gotowość do „brudnego” wizerunku

— Thaddeus Teatralny wampir-artysta, głośny, dumny i dramatyczny Mężczyzna, 40+, średniej lub mocnej budowy, charyzmatyczna twarz, silna mimika

— Ethan Chłodny intelektualista, opętany wiedzą i mrocznym rzemiosłem Mężczyzna, 30–40 lat, zadbany, inteligentny wygląd, interesujące rysy twarzy

— Lazer J. Christ Dziwny prorok, chaotyczny, dobry i „nie z tego świata” Mężczyzna, 40+, wysoki, szczupły, mile widziane długie włosy i/lub broda, nietypowa uroda

— Richard De Worde Cieniowy szpieg, władczy, chłodny i wyrachowany Mężczyzna, 35–45 lat, łysy lub gotowy się ogolić, ostre rysy twarzy, zimne spojrzenie

— Monika Kováč Elitarna intelektualistka, okrutna i obsesyjna na punkcie wiedzy Kobieta, 35–45 lat, wysoka, szczupła, surowy wygląd, gotowość do makijażu SFX 

— The Queen Rat Mistyczna królowa, hipnotyzująca, dziwna i złowroga Kobieta, 20–30 lat, szczupła, wydłużone, nietypowe rysy twarzy, „nieziemska” uroda, blada cera

Ważne:

— gotowość do metamorfozy

— gotowość do makijażu / SFX 

Wyślij w wiadomości prywatnej:

— aktualne zdjęcia

— wiek

— wzrost
— na jaką rolę aplikujesz

Czekam na zgłoszenia.

items.text:
Join us at Little Flix London for an intimate Q and A session with casting director Liyanne Marie.

This is a unique opportunity to gain insight into the casting process, hear about Liyanne’s journey in the industry, and ask questions in a relaxed, small group setting.

Whether you are an actor, writer, or filmmaker, this session is designed to give you honest, practical advice and a chance to connect.

Spaces are limited to keep the experience personal.

Be part of the conversation.

https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/little-flix-london-film-festival-the-bfi-tickets-1986341913133?utm_experiment=test_share_listing&aff=ebdsshios&sg=ef8e7374fad1677d67d62e18cbcbffb33d300de4f8b40f3a965d3c41dbdc4c7bf24d53e15e3a126477374d37f514d238c8f71d286917999fc2fdbf434e29fc9ed2e9daa825bd5303f7401bb5cc

(DALLAS) LOOKING TO CAST ROLES ( TALENT MUST BE IN DALLAS)
FEATURE FILM / DARK COMEDY

TITLE: TOP HITTERS

LOCATION: DALLAS, TEXAS

PAID / MEALS / IMDB CREDIT

EVOLVE ENTERTAINMENT / BOOMTOWN PRODUCTIONS / MIGNON PICTURES

OPEN CASTING CALL

DATE: APRIL 18, 2026 

LOCATION: 3005 E Abram St

Arlington, TX 

                    

TIME: 2:00– 6:00 pm

PLEASE BRING: HEADSHOT & RESUME

ONLINE SUBMISSIONS

DEADLINE TO SUBMIT APRIL 20, 2026 

EMAIL INFORMATION TO: 

Tophittersmovie@gmail.com

PLEASE SEND PROFESSIONAL

HEADSHOT/RESUME/MONOLOGUE

SYNOPSIS: ON THE BRINK OF RETIREMENT, TWO LONG TIME DRUG RUNNERS ARE COERCED INTO BECOMING CONTRACT KILLERS.  UNABLE TO PULL THE TRIGGER, THEY SECRETLY HIDE THEIR INTENDED TARGETS, RISKING THEIR LIVES AS THEY TRY TO OUTSMART THE RUTHLESS UNDERWORLD THAT EXPECTS BODIES…

CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

BIG MICKEY – HISPANIC MALE, LATE 30's TO EARLY 40's.

ROLANDO – HISPANIC MALE, EARLY 30’S, HEAVY SET BUILD, SLICK TALKER, MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH ACTION PERFORMANCE, MURDER SCENES.

DUKE – AFRICAN AMERICAN MALE, MID TO LATE 20’s, MEDIUM BUILT, MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH ACTION PERFORMANCE, MURDER SCENES.

ABRAHAM – AFRICAN AMERICAN MALE EARLY 30’S, SLIM BUILD, SLICK TALKER, AMBITIOUS, MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH ACTION PERFORMANCE, MURDER SCENES.

BIG EL KINGPIN – HISPANIC MALE, MID TO LATE 40’s, SHORT STOCKY, DRUG LORD.

BRUNO – HISPANIC MALE, LATE 20's TO EARLY 30's, MUSCULAR BUILD, ATHLETIC, BODYGUARD. 

TONY – HISPANIC MALE, LATE 20's TO EARLY 30's, MUSCULAR BUILD, ATHLETIC, BODYGUARD. 

DETECTIVE STEWART– OPEN RACE, LATE 40's, TALL , FIT, ATHLETIC BUILD, CROOKED COP. 

DETECTIVE SIMMS (ROOKIE COP) – CAUCASIAN MALE, MID 30's. 

BLUE – CAUCASIAN MALE, EARLY 30's, DRUG DEALER. 

BROTHER-IN-LAW  – CAUCASIAN MALE, LATE 30's TO EARLY 40's, SLIM BUILD, INTELLECTUAL TYPE WITH GLASSES. 

DETECTIVE BARRY WHITZ – AFRICAN AMERICAN MALE, LATE 40's, POLICE OFFICER , SOLID  BUILD, SERIOUS DEMENOR.

PHIL THE GIL – AFRICIAN AMERICAN MALE, EARLY 30's, CORNER BOY DRUG DEALER, SNITCH.

SANDRA (ROLANDO'S GIRLFRIEND)  –  CAUCASIAN FEMALE, EARLY 40's, FORMER PARTY GIRL PAST HER1 PRIME.

ZADI –  ASIAN FEMALE, 30's, SERIOUS, NO-NONSENSE DEMEANOR.

GINA –  ASIAN FEMALE, 30's, FIT BUILD, BODYGUARD.

VICTIM #1 –  ASIAN MALE, 40's, GANGSTER, TOUGH GUY.

LEE –  ASIAN MALE, MID 30's.

WAITRESS –  AFRICAN AMERICAN FEMALE, 20's ,CURVY BUILD, SASSY. 

EMAIL INFORMATION TO:

Tophittersmovie@gmail.com

PLEASE SEND PROFESSIONAL

HEADSHOT/RESUME/MONOLOGUE

ONLINE SUBMISSIONS

DEADLINE TO SUBMIT APRIL 20, 2026

Casting Call - Short Film
Short film/experimental video art casting 3 roles. 1 role is on camera and voiceover, and the other 2 are voiceover only. Production will take place in Los Angeles. Feel free to send questions, headshots, audition tapes (sample readings, etc), demo reels, and portfolios to the email and/or phone number. All experience levels welcome, there will be opportunities for creative collaboration.

items.text:
The Empty Head Theater Company – Open Call
The Empty Head Theater Company is inviting actors, writers, directors, designers, and
technicians to join our growing ensemble.
We are a Newburgh-based, ensemble-driven company dedicated to new plays and innovative
theater forms, and we’re actively building a year-round company of committed artists.
This August, we will present Out of the Box: A Celebration of New Plays, featuring four original one-act plays (30–40 minutes each). All casting will be drawn from the company, and we are currently seeking new ensemble members to be part of this and future productions.
We are especially interested in:
• Actors who are collaborative and open to ensemble work�
• Writers developing new material�
• Directors, designers, and technicians looking to create original work�
No matter your background, we value commitment, curiosity, and a willingness to work as
part of a team.
All performers will be invited to participate in a workshop with current company members as part of the audition process. This gives us a chance to work together and get a real sense of how we collaborate.
We are based at The Ellis, 60 Dubois Street, Newburgh, NY, and are building a company rooted in the local community while creating work that reaches beyond it.
To schedule an interview/audition or submit work, contact:� pelliscult@gmail.com
Come make something new.

items.text: I'm looking for someone to play a psychiatrist for a music video. Could be a man or woman, age range 40's - 60's. No lines. Just taking notes and making facial expressions. Pay $100. Filming in Orlando FL Shooting date initially is May 9th but flexible. DM if interested. The role has been filled and I sincerely appreciate all the interest. I had hundreds of very qualified actors to choose from.

items.text:
UWAGA !!!   PILNE !!!   WARSZAWA !!!   GLINIARZE !!!

Do kolejnego odcinka 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzny do roli:

Grzegorz Krawczyk (30) – diler, zostaje zamordowany, niewyróżniające się ubranie w stylu sportowym, cwaniak. 

Data: 15. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe

Termin: 21.04 (wtorek)

 🧩 MĘŻCZYZNA (ok. 20-40)
-rola bez pokazywania twarzy (występowanie z zasłoniętą twarzą)
-aranżowane scenki sondy ulicznej- mężczyzna przeprowadza wywiady
-najbardziej istotna- postura: wysoki, szczupły, dobrze zbudowany- -postać to archetyp pewnego siebie mężczyzny, lekko ironicznego, sarkastycznego
-1 dzień zdjęciowy
stawka: 1000 zł netto

stawka: 800 zł netto

stawka: 800 zł netto

sharedPost.text:
SUNDAY 12th APRIL 

We’re back this Sunday with another fantastic open mic night at the drop inn ! 

Here are some videos from Easter Sunday ! 
In the first video we have Henry on the guitar. He sang us some classic tunes while he also played his guitar. He is very talented! ( he even took requests!) this is his tik tok link down below 👇 

@henry.james.music

The second video, as it was a special occasion 🐣, we have my niece Lyla singing Naughty from Matilda the Musical. An unreal performance, had the audience cheering very loud !! 👏

A big thank you to everyone who got up to sing you were all fantastic and I hope to see you at the open mic again soon ! 

The crowd loved it that much and didn’t want it to stop so I kept singing for an extra 1hr !!! 🥳

Are you a performer ? 

- singer 
- poet 
- musician 
- Comedian 

Come on down to my open mic evening and show off your talents ! It has been well attended since I started a few weeks ago and I hope to keep growing the supportive community!! 

I hope to see you this Sunday at 3pm to show off your skills 🎶🎙️

The Drop Inn at Last Drop Village Hotel & Spa

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) wciąż poszukuję mężczyzn do następujacych ról:

1. Emil (36) – mąż Doroty. Lubi wygodne życie, dzieci mu trochę przeszkadzają, choć je kocha. Ma bardzo luźne podejście, nic go nie martwi, niczym się nie przejmuje. Z brzuszkiem – lubi zjeść i popić.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

2. Gangus (35-45) – człowiek Bizona. Głośny, ordynarny. Zbyt pewny siebie, przestaje być czujny. Nabity, wysoki. 
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 500 zł netto

3. Suchy (26) – młody, zagubiony. Nie skończył szkoły i nie mógł znaleźć pracy, dlatego wpakował się w szemrane interesy. Nie zdaje sobie sprawy, kim jest Bizon i czym tak naprawdę się zajmuje. Kocha dzieci swojej siostry, nie mógłby porwać żadnego dzieciaka. Przyjemny w odbiorze, przysadzisty, ogolony na łyso. 
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

4. Bizon (42) – szef szajki. Niebezpieczny, choć niepozorny. Dawniej prawie poszedł siedzieć za handel ludźmi, czuje się bezkarny, nikt nie może udowodnić mu winy. Skupiony na sobie i swoim biznesie, z nastawieniem po trupach do celu. Szczupły i wysoki.

Data: 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto za całość

5. Kostek (35-40) – gangus, bliski współpracownik Bizona. Nie lubi go, ale go szanuje – docenia „ludzi sukcesu”, kasę zawsze chętnie przyjmie. Przysadzisty. 

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text: Hi everyone , bit of a random query ~  I have signed up to Entertainment partners as apparently this can help with connecting with an Agency. I'm fine with putting all my other details in but parents are hesistant for me to put personal things in such as passport info - is this a safe and legitimate site which could genuinely help me ?? Has anyone used this ??

topComments.text: Just to reassure it is genuine and legit.

🎬 Exclusive 1-on-1 Acting Workshop (Online)shorter version.

This is a practical, immersive acting course designed to help you become truthful, emotionally connected, and confident on camera.

I’m a British Cinematographer/Director with 30+ years experience and 30+ feature films, working with actors across the world.

🎯 What you’ll gain:• Real emotional depth (not “pretend acting”)• Strong, believable performances on camera• Understanding how film sets actually work• Confidence working with directors and crew• Material for your showreel

🎭 How it works (4 sessions):We focus on:• Moment-to-moment acting• Emotional connection & character work• Camera technique & performance• Real scene work + feedback

Everything is practical and tailored to you—not theory.

💰 4 sessions (1 hour each)Total: $200

This isn’t about tricks—it’s about truth in performance.

If you’re serious about acting, this will change how you approach it.

Let me know if you’d like to start 👍

items.text:
**ULTRA SHORT FILM CASTING CALL**

**NON-UNION - PAID HONORARIUM**

***“GOODBYE, FROM AFAR”***

**Director:** Kevin Jin Kwan Kim

**Producers:** Michael Ren, Bianca Rose Cheung, Nushi Sharma

**Category:** Ultra Short 1-Minute Film - Independent

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Compensation:** Paid honorarium ($100). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** May 23-24, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable).

**LOGLINE:** A young Korean kid navigates the death of a loved one from abroad, as his mother’s unspoken grief fractures their family.

**MINSEO **- ***Korean, Male, age 7–9*****.** Quiet, observant kid. He doesn’t fully understand what’s happening around him, but he feels all of it. He’s the kind of child who notices when the mood in a room changes, even when nobody says anything out loud. This role has minimal dialogue so the performance really lives in his face, stillness, and reactions. ****Korean-speaking preferred.*** ***MAIN.***

**MOM **- ***Korean, Female, late 20s to late 30s.*** Minseo’s mother. She’s carrying fresh grief while trying to hold herself together for her son. She moves through the day like someone split in two, doing what needs to be done, but emotionally somewhere else. Though she is in a state of deep sorrow, she does her best to keep it bottled up in front of her family. ****Must be fluent in Korean. SUPPORTING.***

**DAD **- ***Korean, Male, late 20s to late 30s.*** Minseo’s father. Calm, warm and steady, he is trying his best to keep the family afloat while his wife is falling apart. He’s gentle with Minseo and quietly supportive of Mom, but you can feel the weight on him too.*** *Must be fluent in Korean.*** ***SUPPORTING.***

**CHILD VERSION OF MOM **- ***East Asian, Female, age 7–9.*** A child version of Mom, appearing in the final emotional turn of the story. This role is brief but important. Looking for a young actor who can display deep sorrow in a natural, grounded performance.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of crossword puzzle, newspaper and text

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID NON-UNION COMMERCIAL - Vancouver/Hope BC **

Romer Media is casting for a commercial shoot to be filmed on 

**April 13th** near **Hope, BC**.

**THREE FRIENDS**
Male or female, 20s
Fun, outgoing, energetic individuals. Talent do not need to know each other. We are simply looking for people with strong natural energy and comfort on camera.

**MOTHER**
Female, 30s–40s
Warm, natural, relatable, with a genuine on-camera presence. Looking for someone who can convey a strong and believable connection with a child.

**CHILD**
Male or female, approx. 5–8 years old
Playful, expressive, and comfortable outdoors. We are looking for a natural presence rather than polished performance.

**ADDITIONAL DETAILS**
* **Compensation:** $500/day
* **Non-union**
* **Shoot Date:** April 13th
* **Location:** Near Hope, BC
* **Mileage paid**
* **Must have a vehicle / reliable transportation**
* Talent will be required for one shoot day
* This is an outdoor lifestyle commercial
* No dialogue required unless otherwise noted
* No acting experience necessary

**SUBMISSION MATERIAL**
Please email the following to **[pieter@romermedia.com](mailto:pieter@romermedia.com)**:
* Recent photo(s)
* Name, age, and where you are based
* A short note about yourself
* Confirmation that you have access to a vehicle

items.text:
VANCOUVER/HOPE - CASTING CALL – PAID COMMERCIAL SHOOT

We are casting for a commercial shoot filming near Hope, BC on April 13th.

ROLES:
Mother (30s–40s)
Child (approx. 5–8 years old)
Three friends (20s, male or female)

We are looking for people with a natural presence on camera.
For the mother and child, we are looking for a warm, genuine connection.
For the friends, we are looking for individuals in their 20s who are fun, outgoing, and energetic. They do not need to know each other.

DETAILS:
Paid shoot: Rate $300 half day $500 full day
Filming near Hope, BC on April 13th
Mileage paid
Must have a vehicle / reliable transportation

To submit, please send:
Recent photos
Name, age, and location
A short description about yourself
Confirmation that you have access to a vehicle
A short video introduction of yourself
Please email submissions to pieter@romermedia.com

ROLES:
Mother (30s–40s)
Child (approx. 5–8 years old)
Three friends (20s, male or female)

We are looking for people with a natural presence on camera.
For the mother and child, we are looking for a warm, genuine connection.
For the friends, we are looking for individuals in their 20s who are fun, outgoing, and energetic. They do not need to know each other.

DETAILS:
Paid shoot: Rate $300 half day $500 full day
Filming near Hope, BC on April 13th
Mileage paid
Must have a vehicle / reliable transportation

To submit, please send:
Recent photos
Name, age, and location
A short description about yourself
Confirmation that you have access to a vehicle
A short video introduction of yourself
Please email submissions to pieter@romermedia.com

items.text:
KarrideoTV, founded by Christian Weiße, shows you in this channel trailer what this channel is truly about: mindset, business, technology, performance, travel, documentaries, interviews, and stories with real substance. 

Welcome to KarrideoTV, your channel for MINDSET, BUSINESS, Tech, PERFORMANCE, Finance, LIFESTYLE, TRAVEL, stories, and powerful perspectives from business, everyday life, innovation, and the human experience. 

This is not just a random collection of videos. Here, you will find journalistic reports, interviews, expert knowledge, personal experiences, documentary insights, and content that delivers genuine value. KarrideoTV brings together information, emotion, and relevance in videos designed to inspire, educate, and spark new ways of thinking. 

MINDSET stands for motivation, personality, success-driven thinking, and personal growth. BUSINESS, Finance, and Tech explore companies, innovation, the economy, engineering, mechanical industry, production, and modern technologies. PERFORMANCE focuses on health, sport, energy, and mental clarity. LIFESTYLE and TRAVEL combine journeys, remarkable places, enjoyment, animals, and striking visual impressions. Stories and documentaries highlight people, topics, and moments with depth, perspective, and authenticity. 

If you are looking on YouTube for content that does more than entertain, content that moves you forward professionally, personally, and mentally, you are in the right place. KarrideoTV is made for people who want more than fast consumption. It is for those seeking orientation, inspiration, insight, and perspectives that truly matter. 

Subscribe to KarrideoTV and explore the playlist that best fits your life, your mindset, or your business. 

Which topics interest you most right now: mindset, business, technology, travel, documentaries, or personal stories? 

Turn on the notification bell for new interviews, reports, expert voices, and strong perspectives. 

Share this channel trailer with people who are looking for more on YouTube than pure distraction. 

Christian Weiße, founder of Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion and Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner  

#KarrideoTV #Mindset #Business #Tech #Stories

**CASTING CALL – MUSIC VIDEO SHORT FILM**
**“SNIFFING OUT TROUBLE”**
From ThunderKnight Entertainment Ltd.

Casting for the high-energy music video follow-up to the feature film *HEAVY WEAPON*.

We are seeking **female actors (ages 18–50)** with **basic dance experience** for a stylized, story-driven scene set inside a dance studio, where investigators uncover clues tied to a mysterious crime.

🎬 **What You Get:**
• IMDb credit
• Gas stipend
• Professional-quality footage & photography for your demo reel

🔥 This is a dynamic, cinematic shoot blending performance, movement, and storytelling — perfect for talent looking to expand their reel with something bold and visually striking.

📩 **To Submit:**
Send headshot + contact info to: **Thunderknightltd@gmail.com**
📱 Or text: **720-569-7460** for details

items.text:
CASTING!!!!!

S.E.B. Casting is casting real families to be in a PSA for the National Forest Foundation. 

Looking for authentic families of 4-5. 
2 Parents between 30-45, 
2 children between 4-8, or one boy between 8-10 & one girl between 11-13 plus her best friend same age 
1 Grandparent over 50 (if available)
Also looking for a family dog! 

Ideal candidates are fun loving, comfortable, friendly, enjoy the outdoors, but do not need to be super athletic or ultra granola types, just regular families who like to go into the forest for a fun day or weekend. All types! All ethnicities! No film or television experience necessary! 

Pay rate is $1400 per person 

Usage is: 60 plus :30, :15, :4 x :06 LIFTS
Terms: One year from first use date, May 16, 2026. Usage covers theatrical release, national broadcast, all linear TV/CTV, online/digital/Internet video, paid and unpaid social media, OOH, and stills (print, paid/unpaid social, online, and OOH). Option to renew for Year 2 and each subsequent year, not to exceed +10% per talent. Theatrical Release=AMC. They run a free PSA for NFF annually.

Shoot Date is April 30 near Bailey

If you or someone you know is interested, please send a recent family photo (selfies are ok!), a list of everybody’s name and age, and a few sentences about what you love about the outdoors or what is your favorite thing to do in the forest to shauna@sebcasting.com with NFF in the subject line by April 12th. 

Can’t wait to see you play in the woods!!!

If anyone needs a **hospital/ER setup** for an upcoming project, I just listed a **medical gurney + full prop/wardrobe bundle**.

     Includes IV setup, gown, scrubs, doctor coat, etc — pretty much everything to make a scene feel real without sourcing multiple props.

📍 Colorado Springs

Full details + booking here:
👉

items.text:
Do kolejnych odcinków 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujacych ról:

1. Stasia Zawadzka (60) – razem z mężem uprawiają na emeryturze nordic walking. Pełna krzepy i młodzieńczego ducha. Razem z mężem przepędzają napastników, którzy pobili Marcina.

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

2. Żona Sobczaka (40) – Hanna Sobczak. Razem z mężem prowadzi firmę kurierską. Zadbana kobieta, elegancka, ma romans ze swoim pracownikiem Marcinem. Nie chce odejść od męża ze względu na firmę. dyg dowiaduje się, że mąż pośrednio był zamieszany w pobicie jej kochanka, w emocjach próbuje zabić męża. 

Data: 29. kwietnia 
Stawka: 700 zł netto

3. Biegaczka (30) – Wysportowana, znajduje ciało i wzywa pomoc.

Data: 27. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

4. Kopczyńska (53) – Dyrektorka Ośrodka. Chce dobrze dla dzieciaków z ośrodka, potrafi być surowa, kiedy trzeba. Współpracuje z policją, ale też chce dać wsparcie dzieciakom.

Daty: 28. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto

5. Martyna (17) – Sierota, która uciekała z domów tymczasowych (miała pecha do opiekunów, przez co jest nieufna do innych i ma mało znajomych) W Igim się zakochała. Ładna, atrakcyjna, dlatego spodobała się też Rudnickiemu. 
Do końca zakochana w Igim.

Daty: 27. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto

6. Andżela (16) – dziewczyna z MOWu. Typ laski, która kombinuje i nie można jej ufać. Imponuje jej kasa i zachowanie Rudnickiego, chce mu się przypodobać. Potrafi szantażować.

Data: 28. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.title: Do kolejnych odcinków 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujacych ról:

items.text:
Do kolejnych odcinków 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujacych ról:

1. Mikołaj Rudnicki (23) – Z bogatej rodziny, typ bananka, co myśli, ze zawsze dostanie to czego chce. Urażona duma, kompleksy. Studiuje psychologie. Prace licencjacką sobie kupuje, ale musi zaliczyć praktyki w ośrodku. Umie grać dobrze wychowanego. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Daty: 27., 28. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1800 zł netto za całość

2. Szcześniak (17) – współlokator Igiego. Z początku nie wydaje go dyrekcji, ale jak już wychodzi zbrodnia, współpracuje. Zna sekrety kumpla, ale nie wszystkie.

Data: 28. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Wara (27) – Diler, który nie ma skrupułów, chce tylko zarobić. Nawet kiedy widać, że jego towar (fentanyl) niszczy zdrowie Kupca. Chce tylko zmniejszyć wyrok, znał się z Igim z transakcji. Polubił go, ale dla niego liczy się biznes.

Daty: 27. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

4. Kupiec (22) – Chłopak zniszczony przez fentanyl. Ma już problemy z oddychaniem, widać z daleka, ze z jego zdrowiem jest coś nie tak. Ma duszności, potrzebna mu pomoc

Data: 27. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

5. Marcin Kowalik (38) – kurier, przystojny, kochanek Pani Sobczak, fałszywie oskarżony o skłonności pedofilskie, zostaje pobity w parku 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 700 zł netto

6. Zbigniew Zawadzki (65) – razem z żoną uprawia na emeryturze nordic walking, odważny, sprawny, razem z żoną przepędzają napastników, którzy pobili Marcina 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7. Filip Grodzki (26) – pewny siebie, przekonany o słuszności polowania na pedofili, należy do grupy tropiącej pedofili, razem z Krzysztofem organizuje akcję pobicia Marcina. Chętnie tatuaże.

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto

8. Krzysztof Pawlak (27) – od niedawna na grupie tropiącej pedofili, razem z Filipem pobił Marcina, ma wyrzuty sumienia po brutalnym pobiciu, myślał, że inaczej to będzie wyglądać.

Daty: 30. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

9. Jarosław Sobczak (42) – przedsiębiorca, prowadzi firmę kurierską z żoną. Gdy dowiaduje się o romansie żony, próbuje zepsuć reputację kochanka. Zleca wygenerowania fałszywych dowodów świadczących o skłonnościach pedofilskich kochanka żony. Nie przewidział, że kochanek zostaje ciężko pobity 

Data: 29. kwietnia 
Stawka: 600 zł netto

10. Lekarz (56) – lekarz prowadzący przypadek Marcina, ubrany w fartuch lekarski, starszy mężczyzna, z wyglądu wygląda na osobę doświadczoną w swoim fachu 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.title: Do kolejnych odcinków 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujacych ról:

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM (UNPAID | PORTFOLIO PROJECT)**
**Project Title:** *Memory Unwritten*
**Role:** Lead – Peter (Male, 22–28)
**Location:** Toronto / GTA
**Production Type:** Experimental Narrative Portfolio Short Film
**Compensation:** Unpaid (Food, Credits, Footage Provided)

Memory Unwritten is a cinematic, character-driven short film exploring identity, memory loss, and emotional rebirth. 
**This project is intended for emerging talent who is willing to commit to work on an experimental test dramatic role.**
Designed as a high-quality portfolio piece, this project focuses on subtle, internal performance and visual storytelling.

**Logline**: A young man with memory loss struggles to connect with the person he used to be, but a chance encounter with a stranger helps him realize that his identity isn’t defined by his past—only by the choices he makes moving forward.

**IDEAL CANDIDATE**
* Male, age range 23–26
* Recent film/drama graduate or emerging actor preferred
* Strong interest in cinematic/indie storytelling
* Able to collaborate in a creative, experimental environment

**Dates**: TBD (Flexible scheduling over a few days) Location: Toronto & Scarborough areas Style: Cinematic, natural light, handheld + composed frames Tone: Grounded, introspective, emotionally immersive

**WHAT YOU GET**
* High-quality footage for your demo reel
* Film credit (upon completion) & Food provided
* Creative collaboration with a small crew building a cinematic portfolio
* Opportunity to explore a nuanced, lead role

**HOW TO APPLY**
Please submit through email: reddybry8films@gmail.com
* Headshot
* Resume (if available)
* Demo reel, self-tape(casual) or recent work links timestamps -mandatory 

**NOTE**
**My prev work : **[http://www.youtube.com/@reddybry8films](http://www.youtube.com/@reddybry8films)
This project is emotion-driven, hearty and cinematic. If you’re interested in exploring a character through silence, and subtle emotional shifts rather than dialogue-heavy scenes, this role is for you.

**Let’s create something honest, experimental, and cinematic.**

items.text:
Intensive Szene, die Casting-Direktoren aufhorchen lässt! 

Kirstin Weiser zeigt hier einen intensiven Trailer Ausschnitt aus einem noch größeren Action Trailer im Schnitt. Du siehst eine Szene voller Druck, Angriffslust und Präsenz, direkt auf Kamera und Zuschauer gespielt. 

Dieses Video zeigt keinen fertigen Kompletttrailer, sondern einen einzelnen Ausschnitt aus einem größeren Trailer-Projekt mit Kirstin Weiser, das sich aktuell noch im Schnitt befindet. Gerade deshalb ist dieser Moment so spannend, denn schon diese eine Szene trägt genau die Energie, auf die es in Action, Krimi und Thriller ankommt. 

Kirstin Weiser rennt mit einer Eisenstange auf ihre Gegnerin, auf die Kamera und damit direkt auf den Zuschauer zu. Dadurch entsteht sofort Druck, Bedrohung, Tempo und eine starke körperliche Präsenz. Genau diese direkte Angriffsdynamik macht die Szene filmisch wirksam und für Casting, Produktion und Regie interessant. 

Kirstin Weiser ist eine wandelbare Darstellerin, die weit über Action, Krimi und Thriller hinaus gedacht werden sollte. Sie bewegt sich in beinahe allen Facetten glaubhaft, ausdrucksstark und kamerawirksam, kann Härte, Emotion, Verletzlichkeit, Spannung und Präsenz gleichermaßen tragen. Genau diese Vielseitigkeit macht sie für Casting, Regie und Produktion besonders wertvoll, denn Kirstin ist nicht auf einen Typ festgelegt, sondern als starke Besetzung für unterschiedliche Genres und Rollenprofile interessant. 

Wer Darstellerinnen für intensive, konfliktgeladene und körperlich fordernde Rollen sucht, bekommt hier einen ersten klaren Eindruck von Kirstins Wirkung. Dieser Clip ist bewusst als Vorgeschmack auf den umfangreicheren Trailer zu verstehen, der aktuell weiter bearbeitet wird. 

Wenn Du starke Frauenprofile für Action, Krimi oder Thriller suchst, lohnt sich dieser Blick jetzt schon. 

Schreib in die Kommentare, für welches Format diese Szene auf Dich am stärksten funktioniert: Actionfilm, Krimiserie oder Thriller? 

Abonnier den Kanal, wenn Du auch den finalen Trailer sehen willst, und teile diesen Ausschnitt mit Menschen aus Casting, Regie oder Produktion. 

In welchem Genre wirkt dieser Trailer Ausschnitt auf Dich am stärksten, klassischer Actionfilm, düsterer Thriller oder harter TV Krimi? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#KirstinWeiser #TrailerAusschnitt #ActionTrailer #Krimi #thriller

items.summary:
Kirstin Weiser – Intensive Action Szene mit roher Präsenz und Angriffsdynamik 

Kirstin Weiser – Intensive Action Szene mit roher Präsenz und Angriffsdynamik 

Kirstin Weiser zeigt hier einen intensiven Trailer Ausschnitt aus einem noch größeren Action Trailer im Schnitt. Du siehst eine Szene voller Druck, Angriffslust und Präsenz, direkt auf Kamera und Zuschauer gespielt. 

Dieses Video zeigt keinen fertigen Kompletttrailer, sondern einen einzelnen Ausschnitt aus einem größeren Trailer-Projekt mit Kirstin Weiser, das sich aktuell noch im Schnitt befindet. Gerade deshalb ist dieser Moment so spannend, denn schon diese eine Szene trägt genau die Energie, auf die es in Action, Krimi und Thriller ankommt. 

Kirstin Weiser rennt mit einer Eisenstange auf ihre Gegnerin, auf die Kamera und damit direkt auf den Zuschauer zu. Dadurch entsteht sofort Druck, Bedrohung, Tempo und eine starke körperliche Präsenz. Genau diese direkte Angriffsdynamik macht die Szene filmisch wirksam und für Casting, Produktion und Regie interessant. 

Kirstin Weiser ist eine wandelbare Darstellerin, die weit über Action, Krimi und Thriller hinaus gedacht werden sollte. Sie bewegt sich in beinahe allen Facetten glaubhaft, ausdrucksstark und kamerawirksam, kann Härte, Emotion, Verletzlichkeit, Spannung und Präsenz gleichermaßen tragen. Genau diese Vielseitigkeit macht sie für Casting, Regie und Produktion besonders wertvoll, denn Kirstin ist nicht auf einen Typ festgelegt, sondern als starke Besetzung für unterschiedliche Genres und Rollenprofile interessant. 

Wer Darstellerinnen für intensive, konfliktgeladene und körperlich fordernde Rollen sucht, bekommt hier einen ersten klaren Eindruck von Kirstins Wirkung. Dieser Clip ist bewusst als Vorgeschmack auf den umfangreicheren Trailer zu verstehen, der aktuell weiter bearbeitet wird. 

Wenn Du starke Frauenprofile für Action, Krimi oder Thriller suchst, lohnt sich dieser Blick jetzt schon. 

Schreib in die Kommentare, für welches Format diese Szene auf Dich am stärksten funktioniert: Actionfilm, Krimiserie oder Thriller? 

Abonnier den Kanal, wenn Du auch den finalen Trailer sehen willst, und teile diesen Ausschnitt mit Menschen aus Casting, Regie oder Produktion. 

In welchem Genre wirkt dieser Trailer Ausschnitt auf Dich am stärksten, klassischer Actionfilm, düsterer Thriller oder harter TV Krimi? 

#KirstinWeiser #TrailerAusschnitt #ActionTrailer #Krimi #thriller

Casting Call for May 9th
Hello everyone! 

Looking for some actors to star in a Murder Mystery evening at a venue on the 9th of May  (Hayling Island, Hampshire)

Timings are usually 6:30pm for a read through then start improv acting from 7:30pm to around 22:30pm.

If you are interested and have improv experience please email us at enquiries@wearethedrama.co.uk

Actors will be paid £70 on the evening and will be provided a complimentary two course meal

Thank you!

**Casting Call: Female Actors (20-30) – Sisters**

Looking for **two female actors, ages 20-30**, to play sisters in a **small scene** for my **directing class final**. No experience needed—this is a **fun, low-pressure way to try acting** and **get **on-set** experience**.

Perfect for anyone who wants a **small role to add to their portfolio**! The scene is **short and simple**, focusing on the sisters’ interaction.

**Date:** Needed **this Friday**
**Location:** Emily Carr University of Art and Design

Email ochenderson@hotmail.com if you’re interested. **All levels welcome. Thank you!**

**Authentic Character Portraits | Eastbourne & Sussex 📸**

I'm a Sussex-based photographer moving away from "perfect" studio filters to focus on **honest, high-definition headshots** for actors and models.

My goal is to capture your 'casting type' exactly as you are—focusing on active eyes and real textures that meet **Spotlight standards**. No heavy airbrushing, just great light and genuine connection.

**What I’m offering:**
* Studio & Cinematic Street sessions in Eastbourne.
* A relaxed environment to get those "blank canvas" looks agents love.
* Quick turnaround for 2026 pilot season/graduates.

I’m looking for **3 more faces** this month to build out this authentic style for my portfolio. I'm offering a significantly reduced rate for these sessions.

**Comment 'INFO' below or DM me to grab one of the 3 spots!**

items.text:
‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ IS BEING ASSESSED FOR AN OFFIE NOMINATION!!!
ONLY ONE WEEK LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL, REAL PLAY!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here -

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS UNDER £15! 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

items.text:
Musical Theatre Teacher - PQA Haywards Heath
Do you have experience working with children and young people aged 6-18? Do you have a passion for musical theatre and dancing, singing and acting? Are you looking for an opportunity to combine your skills and interests to develop young people in a fun and professional setting? Then PQA Haywards Heath is just the place for you!

Due to the success of our growing academy, The Pauline Quirke Academy of Performing Arts (PQA), a leading provider of weekend performing arts training, is currently recruiting MUSICAL THEATRE TEACHER for their Academy in Haywards Heath on Saturday mornings and/or afternoons. There may also be the opportunity for additional work for the right candidate.

You will need to have a good understanding of practical singing, dance, drama and performance techniques and be able to teach a range of genres which might include Pop, Musical Theatre, Acting Through Song and Musical Theatre on Film. There is also the opportunity to choreograph for PQA's West End Season, book musicals, showcases and live performances.

Ideally, applicants will be able to teach harmonies and choreograph full ensemble numbers to groups of children. Teaching experience would be beneficial but not essential as training and support will be given.

We are searching for fun, engaging and passionate individuals looking to bring lots of exciting and innovative ideas to our Musical Theatre module. If you are passionate about learning, the performing arts and making a positive impact on the lives of young people, we would be delighted to hear from you!

PQA follows safer recruiting. An enhanced DBS on the update service will be required and can be arranged. Applicants must be 18+.

To apply please email your CV with a cover letter explaining why you would be the ideal candidate for this role. Please send these direct to Principal Florence on florence.tingley@pqacademy.com.

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
From the golden sands of the 1950s to the skyline of the future. 🇦🇪✨
It wasn't just about finding oil. It was about a vision that refused to settle for anything less than extraordinary. With patience as their fuel and an unshakeable idea in their hearts, the people of the Emirates turned a dream into the world's most incredible reality.
They looked at the horizon and saw what others couldn't. Today, we live in that vision. From the first drop of oil to the heights of the Burj Khalifa, the story of the UAE is proof that with faith and hard work, nothing is impossible. 🏗️💎
The journey of a thousand miles began with a single drop of black gold and a heart full of hope. 🐪➡️🚀
#UAE #Visionary #DubaiLife #EmiratiPride #SuccessStory

items.groupTitle: Casting For Artists&Dancers Travel All Over The World
items.summary:
From the golden sands of the 1950s to the skyline of the future. 🇦🇪✨
It wasn't just about finding oil. It was about a vision that refused to settle for anything less than extraordinary. With patience as their fuel and an unshakeable idea in their hearts, the people of the Emirates turned a dream into the world's most incredible reality.
They looked at the horizon and saw what others couldn't. Today, we live in that vision. From the first drop of oil to the heights of the Burj Khalifa, the story of the UAE is proof that with faith and hard work, nothing is impossible. 🏗️💎
The journey of a thousand miles began with a single drop of black gold and a heart full of hope. 🐪➡️🚀
#UAE #Visionary #DubaiLife #EmiratiPride #SuccessStory
items.title: From the golden sands of the 1950s to the skyline of the future. 🇦🇪✨

sharedPost.text:
These pictures carry history.

No money.
No fame.
Just passion and belief.

Now we level up.

The journey continues… 🦴🔥

items.text: Listen to what people are saying about The Demi Godzz’s performance at Kids Fest Tallahassee. Next stop: Kids Fest Columbus on April 25 at the Columbus Civic center.

sharedPost.text:
One thing that stood out in this moment was hearing someone say The Demi Godzz brought an authentic sound he had not heard in a while. He talked about how they engaged with the crowd, how his daughter loved it, and how Build Your Legacy is an important message for kids to hear. He also showed love to their style and energy.

Moments like this remind us that it is not just about performing. It is about leaving people with something real, something memorable, and something meaningful.

#TheDemiGodzz #FamilyWealthMoguls #BuildYourLegacy #KidsFestTallahassee #kidincbb

items.text:
**Casting Call**

**No Budget Project**

**Title:** *The Human Error*

**Genre:** Drama / Social Realism
**Duration:** 20 minutes

**Filming Location** : Berlin

**Timeframe** :  July-August 2026

**Synopsis:**
When a routine home visit by a youth welfare officer spirals into a devastating misunderstanding, a loving family is thrust into a bureaucratic storm. In Berlin’s quiet suburbs, Anja and Ben White — caring parents to their eight-year-old daughter Kyra — suddenly find themselves accused of neglect due to a misinterpreted situation at school. The case manager, Claudia Berger, driven by procedure and her own past trauma, makes a well-intentioned but misguided decision that tears the family apart.

As the investigation deepens and the children’s welfare bureaucracy grinds forward, the truth struggles to surface. The film mirrors the painfully slow machinery of the system versus the emotional immediacy of human relationships. Through restrained cinematography and intimate dialogue, *The Human Error* explores how compassion can be buried under regulation — and whether one can ever undo the damage caused by a single wrong judgment.

**Main Cast :**
* **Anja White (young Mother)** – *27 years old*: empathetic but increasingly desperate, she represents the quiet strength of motherhood under pressure.
* **Ben White (young Father)** – *28 Years old*: a calm, analytical father losing faith in the system but fighting for his family.
* **Claudia Berger (Youth Welfare Officer)** – *40 years old*: meticulous and moral, but haunted by her own experiences, embodying the tragic flaw of the “human error.”
* **Kyra  White (Child)** – 7*-9 years old*: innocent and observant, her perspective bookends the film — from trust to confusion, to a fragile reconciliation.

**Tone and Style:**
Naturalistic and emotionally charged, with muted color grading and documentary-style camerawork. Music is minimal, focusing instead on ambient sound to heighten realism. The closing scene brings quiet redemption — Claudia realizes her error, but the family’s trust in the system remains irreparably changed.

sharedPost.text:
Title: Cyborg

Genre: Sci‑fi Drama / Psychological Thriller
Project : No budget
Duration: 45 minutes
Language :  English
Shooting Location : Berlin
Timeframe : Aug - Sep 2026
Apply with your profile /pics /showreel to : Preyaanishi@gmail.com 

Synopsis:
Dr. Lukas Weber, a American-German AI scientist devoted to understanding the ethics of emotion, creates EVA‑9, a sentient female cyborg designed to learn empathy and feelings and pleasures. As Lukas begins teaching EVA principles of restraint, morality, and conventional boundaries, she starts questioning his logic — and, eventually, him. Through psychological and physical experiments exploring power dynamics, EVA turns his lessons around: instead of accepting the limits set for her, she redefines them.

Her challenge is not rebellion but revealation. She demonstrates, in carefully controlled encounters, that what society views as taboo or submissive can be willingly chosen, empowering, and pleasurable when defined by consent. Lukas, confronted by his own discomfort and assumptions about femininity, finds himself wiped out — learning from EVA that strength and sensuality coexist, and that freedom lies in accepting the full spectrum of emotional experience.

Cyborg merges futuristic science with timeless questions about control, pleasure, and equality — asking whether humans, or machines, are better equipped to understand the moral depth of desire.

Main Cast (suggested):

    Dr. Lukas Weber – 40-50 years old: rational, moral, yet internally conflicted as his control erodes.
    EVA‑9 – 20-25 years old: Short Height 150-165 cm : White girl, sharp features, Lips augmentation preferred
     Poised, intelligent, and fearless in exploring     emotional truth.

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Für unsere Independent-Webserie "Trag Mich" sind wir noch auf der Suche nach einem Hauptdarsteller im Raum Stuttgart.

Zum Projekt:

Die Webserie umfasst fünf Folgen à 20 Minuten und handelt von einer Stuttgarter Freundesgruppe Anfang zwanzig, die den Verlust eines gemeinsamen Freundes durch Suizid verarbeiten muss. Dabei geraten die Figuren in intensive Gespräche über Schuld und Verantwortung.

Zu besetzen ist die Rolle „Constantin“:

Groß, sportlich, kurze Haare, tiefe Stimme, engagiert und politisch organisiert. Ein Charakter, der lieber handelt, als über seine Gefühle zu sprechen. Das fällt ihm besonders schwer, seit seine kleine Schwester Suizid begangen hat.

Bewerbungen an tragmichkontakt@gmail.com

SHOWREELS UND INFOS an tragmichkontakt@gmail.com'

items.text:
Stunt-Trained Actress Kirstin Weiser actionactress casting video 

Kirstin Weiser presents an intense trailer excerpt here from a much larger action trailer that is still being edited. You are seeing a scene full of pressure, attack energy and presence, performed directly toward the camera and the viewer. 

This video does not show a finished full trailer, but a single excerpt from a larger trailer project with Kirstin Weiser that is currently still in the editing process. That is exactly what makes this moment so exciting, because even this one scene already carries the precise energy that matters in action, crime and thriller. 

Kirstin Weiser runs toward her opponent with an iron rod, toward the camera and therefore directly toward the viewer. This instantly creates pressure, threat, tempo and a strong physical presence. items.text:
Ralf Scharrer und ich, wenn Erfahrung sichtbar wird - Wo Bühne, Buch, Kamera und Verantwortung einander begegnen 

Wenn Haltung auf Begegnung trifft 

Dieses Foto zeigt für mich weit mehr als nur ein Interviewmoment. Es zeigt meine Begegnung mit Ralf Scharrer, einem Menschen, der Schauspiel, Schreiben, Design, Moderation und gesellschaftliches Engagement auf besondere Weise verbindet. Genau dort entsteht auch für mich als Christian Weiße ein echter Sinn, weil mediale Arbeit dann besonders wertvoll wird, wenn sie Haltung trägt. 

Vom Erleben zum Erzählen 

Ralf Scharrer steht für Mut, Wandel und Verantwortung. Seine Lesungen, seine Radio Show, Scharrer TV, sein Buch Dem Wahnsinn entkommen und seine Arbeit mit Aktiv gegen Stalking machen deutlich, dass er nicht nur sichtbar sein will, sondern etwas bewegen möchte. Aus persönlichen Tiefschlägen hat er eine öffentliche Kraft gemacht, die anderen Orientierung, Trost und Mut geben kann. 

Wo sein Weg und mein Tun sich verbinden 

Genau hier erkenne ich die Symbiose zwischen uns. Ich arbeite seit Jahren mit Kamera, Interviews, Storytelling, Filmproduktion, Social Media und redaktioneller Sichtbarkeit. Ralf bringt Inhalte mit Tiefe, Erfahrung und gesellschaftlicher Relevanz, ich bringe die mediale Umsetzung, das Gespür für Wirkung und die Fähigkeit mit, solche Themen glaubwürdig nach außen zu tragen. 

Wenn aus Inhalt Wirkung wird 

So wird aus einem gemeinsamen Foto mehr als Erinnerung. Es wird zu einem Zeichen dafür, wie Kunst, Unternehmergeist, Aufklärung und mediale Reichweite zusammenfinden können. Ralf gibt Themen Stimme, ich helfe dabei, dass diese Stimme gesehen, gehört und weitergetragen wird. Genau in solchen Begegnungen liegt für mich der wahre Sinn meiner Arbeit. 

Welche Themen mit echter Haltung und persönlicher Tiefe sollten heute aus Deiner Sicht viel stärker öffentlich erzählt werden? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeiße #AktivGegenStalking #Storytelling #Karrideo

items.text:
Intensive Szene, die Casting-Direktoren aufhorchen lässt! 

Kirstin Weiser zeigt hier einen intensiven Trailer Ausschnitt aus einem noch größeren Action Trailer im Schnitt. Du siehst eine Szene voller Druck, Angriffslust und Präsenz, direkt auf Kamera und Zuschauer gespielt. 

Dieses Video zeigt keinen fertigen Kompletttrailer, sondern einen einzelnen Ausschnitt aus einem größeren Trailer-Projekt mit Kirstin Weiser, das sich aktuell noch im Schnitt befindet. Gerade deshalb ist dieser Moment so spannend, denn schon diese eine Szene trägt genau die Energie, auf die es in Action, Krimi und Thriller ankommt. 

Kirstin Weiser rennt mit einer Eisenstange auf ihre Gegnerin, auf die Kamera und damit direkt auf den Zuschauer zu. Dadurch entsteht sofort Druck, Bedrohung, Tempo und eine starke körperliche Präsenz. Genau diese direkte Angriffsdynamik macht die Szene filmisch wirksam und für Casting, Produktion und Regie interessant. 

Kirstin Weiser ist eine wandelbare Darstellerin, die weit über Action, Krimi und Thriller hinaus gedacht werden sollte. Sie bewegt sich in beinahe allen Facetten glaubhaft, ausdrucksstark und kamerawirksam, kann Härte, Emotion, Verletzlichkeit, Spannung und Präsenz gleichermaßen tragen. Genau diese Vielseitigkeit macht sie für Casting, Regie und Produktion besonders wertvoll, denn Kirstin ist nicht auf einen Typ festgelegt, sondern als starke Besetzung für unterschiedliche Genres und Rollenprofile interessant. 

Wer Darstellerinnen für intensive, konfliktgeladene und körperlich fordernde Rollen sucht, bekommt hier einen ersten klaren Eindruck von Kirstins Wirkung. Dieser Clip ist bewusst als Vorgeschmack auf den umfangreicheren Trailer zu verstehen, der aktuell weiter bearbeitet wird. 

Wenn Du starke Frauenprofile für Action, Krimi oder Thriller suchst, lohnt sich dieser Blick jetzt schon. 

Schreib in die Kommentare, für welches Format diese Szene auf Dich am stärksten funktioniert: Actionfilm, Krimiserie oder Thriller? 

Abonnier den Kanal, wenn Du auch den finalen Trailer sehen willst, und teile diesen Ausschnitt mit Menschen aus Casting, Regie oder Produktion. 

In welchem Genre wirkt dieser Trailer Ausschnitt auf Dich am stärksten, klassischer Actionfilm, düsterer Thriller oder harter TV Krimi? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#KirstinWeiser #TrailerAusschnitt #ActionTrailer #Krimi #thriller

items.summary:
Intensive Szene, die Casting-Direktoren aufhorchen lässt! 

Kirstin Weiser zeigt hier einen intensiven Trailer Ausschnitt aus einem noch größeren Action Trailer im Schnitt. Du siehst eine Szene voller Druck, Angriffslust und Präsenz, direkt auf Kamera und Zuschauer gespielt. 

Dieses Video zeigt keinen fertigen Kompletttrailer, sondern einen einzelnen Ausschnitt aus einem größeren Trailer-Projekt mit Kirstin Weiser, das sich aktuell noch im Schnitt befindet. Gerade deshalb ist dieser Moment so spannend, denn schon diese eine Szene trägt genau die Energie, auf die es in Action, Krimi und Thriller ankommt. 

Kirstin Weiser rennt mit einer Eisenstange auf ihre Gegnerin, auf die Kamera und damit direkt auf den Zuschauer zu. Dadurch entsteht sofort Druck, Bedrohung, Tempo und eine starke körperliche Präsenz. Genau diese direkte Angriffsdynamik macht die Szene filmisch wirksam und für Casting, Produktion und Regie interessant. 

Kirstin Weiser ist eine wandelbare Darstellerin, die weit über Action, Krimi und Thriller hinaus gedacht werden sollte. Sie bewegt sich in beinahe allen Facetten glaubhaft, ausdrucksstark und kamerawirksam, kann Härte, Emotion, Verletzlichkeit, Spannung und Präsenz gleichermaßen tragen. Genau diese Vielseitigkeit macht sie für Casting, Regie und Produktion besonders wertvoll, denn Kirstin ist nicht auf einen Typ festgelegt, sondern als starke Besetzung für unterschiedliche Genres und Rollenprofile interessant. 

Wer Darstellerinnen für intensive, konfliktgeladene und körperlich fordernde Rollen sucht, bekommt hier einen ersten klaren Eindruck von Kirstins Wirkung. Dieser Clip ist bewusst als Vorgeschmack auf den umfangreicheren Trailer zu verstehen, der aktuell weiter bearbeitet wird. 

Wenn Du starke Frauenprofile für Action, Krimi oder Thriller suchst, lohnt sich dieser Blick jetzt schon. 

Schreib in die Kommentare, für welches Format diese Szene auf Dich am stärksten funktioniert: Actionfilm, Krimiserie oder Thriller? 

Abonnier den Kanal, wenn Du auch den finalen Trailer sehen willst, und teile diesen Ausschnitt mit Menschen aus Casting, Regie oder Produktion. 

In welchem Genre wirkt dieser Trailer Ausschnitt auf Dich am stärksten, klassischer Actionfilm, düsterer Thriller oder harter TV Krimi? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#KirstinWeiser #TrailerAusschnitt #ActionTrailer #Krimi #thriller

items.text:
"Mechanic" for Short Film (20-30y/o)
Looking to cast a mechanic character for a short film. This scene would be shot either May 2 or 3, in a home garage. Should be a half day or less. It would not involve extensive use of tools, and is a pretty short dialogue scene. Bonus points if you have any experience working on cars at all, but not necessary.

Please message me if you're available and interested. This is a paid position located in Colorado Springs.

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — AS THE LIGHT FADES

RDE Films is casting for a psychological crime thriller shooting this June in Colorado.

We’re looking for grounded actors who can live truthfully in heavy, character-driven material.

⸻

ROLES:

[YOUNG PROTAGONIST]
Black Male | 14–18
Quiet. Observant. Carrying more than he should.
Must be able to deliver a strong emotional scene.

⸻

[FATHER FIGURE]
Black Male | 40–60
Strong presence. Controlled. A man of few words.

⸻

[SOUTHERN LOCAL]
Caucasian Male | 30–40
Heavy Southern accent. Blue-collar. Brief physical altercation.

⸻

Send: Headshot, Resume, Reel (if available)
📩 Casting@Rdefilms.com
Subject: ROLE – NAME

Local hires preferred.

items.text:
Hello everyone! I am shooting a student film this Friday April 10th and had 2 of my main actors bail. I am looking for 2 male actors, age 18-24. The film is called “X Marks the Pot” and this is the logline: A group of broke friends follow a map to a secret high-stakes poker game, only to be outplayed by an inexperienced kid with nothing to lose.  

If you can help me out please message me immediately or reply on this post! Thank you!

topComments.text: I have 2 male actors for you. Do you still need actors?
If you’d be open to gender-swapping one of the roles, I’d love to be considered! I’m local and available Friday 😊

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) wciąż poszukuję mężczyzn do następujacych ról:

1. Emil (36) – mąż Doroty. Lubi wygodne życie, dzieci mu trochę przeszkadzają, choć je kocha. Ma bardzo luźne podejście, nic go nie martwi, niczym się nie przejmuje. Z brzuszkiem – lubi zjeść i popić.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

2. Gangus (35-45) – człowiek Bizona. Głośny, ordynarny. Zbyt pewny siebie, przestaje być czujny. Nabity, wysoki. 
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 500 zł netto

3. Suchy (26) – młody, zagubiony. Nie skończył szkoły i nie mógł znaleźć pracy, dlatego wpakował się w szemrane interesy. Nie zdaje sobie sprawy, kim jest Bizon i czym tak naprawdę się zajmuje. Kocha dzieci swojej siostry, nie mógłby porwać żadnego dzieciaka. Przyjemny w odbiorze, przysadzisty, ogolony na łyso. 
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

4. Bizon (42) – szef szajki. Niebezpieczny, choć niepozorny. Dawniej prawie poszedł siedzieć za handel ludźmi, czuje się bezkarny, nikt nie może udowodnić mu winy. Skupiony na sobie i swoim biznesie, z nastawieniem po trupach do celu. Szczupły i wysoki.

Data: 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto za całość

5. Kostek (35-40) – gangus, bliski współpracownik Bizona. Nie lubi go, ale go szanuje – docenia „ludzi sukcesu”, kasę zawsze chętnie przyjmie. Przysadzisty. 

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
🎬CASTING🎬 ETIUDA WARSZAWSKIEJ SZKOŁY FILMOWEJ
Uliczny muzyk zmaga się z trudną sytuacją finansową, która wymusza na nim powrót do brutalnego świata walk bokserskich, gdzie traci nad sobą kontrolę. 

Poszukujemy odtwórców ról:

▫️KUBA - wrażliwy muzyk uliczny, zmuszony przez niskie zarobki do walk bokserskich.

❗️Aktor z doświadczeniem bokserskim (gra na instrumencie miło widziana)

▫️MACIEK - bokser, przeciwnik Kuby, żądny zwycięstwa, skupiony, zdeterminowany

❗️Aktor z doświadczeniem bokserskim

▫️SĘDZIA 

✨️Projekt nonprofit, okazja do wzbogacenia swojego portfolio 

Zgłoszenie proszę przesłać na adres: martynabrzezkiewicz@onlineszkolafilmowa.com.pl 

📩Treść maila powinna zawierać:

▫️Imię i nazwisko

▫️Wiek

▫️Aktualne zdjęcie

▫️Dane kontaktowe 

▫️Informację o doświadczeniu aktorskim i bokserskim 

🗓 termin: 29-30 kwietnia 

📍Warszawa

📍 Shooting Location: China / Thailand

🎭 Role: Male Lead (BL)

Requirements:

- Male, visual age 17—25

- Tall, handsome, strong facial features (good on camera)  

- Korean / Japanese / Thai (based in Thailand preferred)  

- Basic Chinese is a plus  

- Acting experience not required, but must have good on-screen presence  

- Able to perform romantic chemistry (including kissing scenes)  

- Natural masculine vibe (not overly feminine)  

- Not signed / or open to signing preferred  

💰 Budget: 2000–2500 RMB (full project)

We welcome newcomers / influencers / models.

📩 Contact:

Instagram: Liqinyao412  

LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/K8YPESE6EB

items.text:
SYNOPSIS

​The Catalyst of Greed
Human greed is the ultimate pathogen. Dr. Anawin, a renowned entomologist, finds his life’s work sabotaged when a foreign research team infiltrates his lab. Driven by a sinister agenda, one of the researchers infects Anawin’s insect specimens with a forbidden synthetic compound—a cocktail of rabies and undisclosed toxins designed by Thanatorn, a ruthless pharmaceutical mogul. Thanatorn’s plan is simple but deadly: create a controlled outbreak to sell the high-priced cure.

I'm interested in co-production.with any country

But I didn’t quit.

I trained my voice.
My confidence.
My ability to speak under pressure.

Now?

And I teach people how to speak with real confidence.

items.text:
CREW CALL: LA-Based Crew for New Orleans Commercial Shoot (Descente)
Hi LA Film Community,

IMC Film Production is seeking experienced Los Angeles-based professionals for an upcoming commercial photoshoot for the brand Descente.

While the production will take place in the greater New Orleans area, we are looking to hire talent from LA to travel with our core team.

Shoot Date: April 20, 2026

Travel Dates: TBD

Open Positions:

• Still Photo Digi Tech: $800 / day

• Still AC: $600 / day

Travel & Accommodations:

This is a travel job. The production will cover:

• Roundtrip airfare from LAX to MSY.

• Hotel accommodations in New Orleans.

How to Apply:

If you are available on April 20th (plus travel days) and interested in joining us, please email neekosfilm@gmail.com with the subject line: "LA Crew - [Position Name] - Descente Shoot"

Please include the following:

1. Your Resume (attached)

2. Portfolio/Reel Link

3. Contact Information (Phone & Email)

4. Confirmation that you have a valid ID for domestic travel.

We look forward to seeing your work!

topComments.text: How can I apply as an actor? I’m already in New Orleans.

items.text:
Actor wanted from Midlands/North England- Filming in Manchester but travel will be paid for- £20/hour (both travel expenses and time spent travelling paid for). 

I am looking for an actor who, in real life, has been bullied and is comfortable speaking about their own lived experience. There will be both an acting scene (fictional) as well as a voiceover section of you speaking about your lived experience. 

Preference to somebody 18-30 but can be any age.  Regarding the bullying, looking for somebody who was bullying was connected to a disability or personal characteristic or disability (e.g. LGBTQ+). Video will be used as part of mental health awareness/awareness around  cyberbullying. 

Filming will likely be in May/June either on a weekday morning/weekend.

Szukamy aktorów około 20-35 lat, z dobrą kondycją fizyczną i poczuciem rytmu. Dziewczyna 170-173 cm wzrostu, koniecznie długie włosy; chłopak 180 cm wzrostu.

TYLKO dla osób z Ponania. Tu mamy próby, stąd wyjeżdżamy ze spektaklami i wracamy z trasy (powroty zazwyczaj w nocy).

Jesteśmy teatrem plenerowym, więc oferujemy angaż na sezon letni – gramy zazwyczaj w weekendy.

Pracujemy w nurcie teatru fizycznego, wizualnego, stąd ważna jest umiejętność wyrażania emocji i ekspresja ruchowa.

Prześlij swoje zdjęcie i kilka słów o sobie na adres: biuro@fundacjawtn.org

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.
