We're on the lookout for male models to front our upcoming catalogue and editorial shoots for Jude Neale — a premium denim brand built on quality craftsmanship, and effortless style.

We're seeking men of all looks, ages, and backgrounds who carry themselves with confidence and feel at home in front of a camera.

items.text: Hey, what’s up people? I￼ wanna be an actor. Where  do I start? I am campaigning to play Jason Todd, a.k.a. the red Hood in the next James Gunn Batman movie

topComments.text: Well seeing that Jason Todd isn’t even close to making an appearance if at all in gunns universe… plus getting to that point takes yearssss of training and experience plus connections. Start off with classes and go from there

Hi miguel, 
You're going to probably hear a lot of negative answers on this post since it's a very lofty goal of yours.  But as a studio and network coach, I think it's a great opportunity to give anyone a step-by-step instruction guide on how to get into bigger roles. 

Let me break down what you're gonna need to do... it may take years but if you follow this, you'll be able to compete for roles like Jason Todd.  

1. Get into classes and training. In order to take on a roll of this size, you're gonna need to understand how to break down a character, a script, and know how to bring him to life.  Acting may look easy, but it's actually extremely complicated and nuanced.  
2. After you've spent some time training so that you understand what to do and how to do it and also how to communicate with other people on set using the same lingo that is used in the entertainment industry, you're gonna want to get headshots.   And no, i'm not talking about doing a selfie, or having your friend with a dslr shoot them.   I'm talking about actual headshots done by an actor headshot photographer.  
3. You're gonna need to build up some credits so that you can have a resume to present to someone like james gunn, showing that you are dependable on a set and have previously brought other characters to life.This resume can include TV and film, but can also include things like theater.  
4. Because Jason Todd is a very physically demanding role.You're gonna want to take some form of stage, fighting and/or stunt classes. 
5. You will need a reel of some kind to show off how you look on camera.  
6. You'll need an agent or other representative to get in touch with James Gunn directly.  There's going to be a lot of people competing for that role and you'll need to professionally position yourself in order to get an opportunity for it.  
7. Since no one wants to take a chance on a newcomer without proof that they can fulfill their obligations on set. You may need to audition for and book multiple smaller rolls before getting bigger opportunities.  

Lofty goals. But if you do as I say and follow the formula for the next 3- 5 years, who knows... it could be you.

items.text:
CASTING CALL — FEMALE ATHLETE (20s)

Hey everyone!

I’m a sports media graduate student developing a mock Nike-style women in sports marketing campaign for my storytelling portfolio.

This is a non-affiliated conceptual project (not officially connected to Nike), created to explore high-level sports branding, cinematic storytelling, and women in athletics.

Project title:
“She Was Never Just One Thing”

I am looking for a female athlete in her 20s who is comfortable performing multiple sports/athletic movements, including (but not limited to):
* Soccer / field drills
* Football or rugby-style catching / contact movement
* Track / sprinting
* Basketball drills / movement
* Boxing (bag work or shadowboxing style movement)
* Basic hockey stickhandling (or athletic simulation movement)
* Martial arts / taekwondo-style movement (experience preferred but not required)

You do NOT need to be elite in all sports, I'm more so looking for:
* Strong athletic ability
* Confidence in movement on camera
* Comfort performing cinematic/choreographed sports action
* Strong presence and energy

This is a portfolio / collaboration project
Actor will receive:
* $150 in compensation for the total work
* Full credit in final release
* Footage for personal reel use
* Tagged promotion across social platforms
* Exposure as part of a cinematic sports storytelling piece

I will also be linking my website + portfolio in the post.

If interested, please shoot me an email at anaselenax@gmail.com (my website/portfolio is also anaselenax.com)
* A short intro
* Any sports background
* Photos or video (if available)

Looking forward to building something powerful and visually impactful.

(No on camera dialogue, strictly voiceover to match the feel of a Nike Campaign)

items.text:
LOOKING FOR ON SITE ASSISTANCE FOR THIS PROJECT: 

Hey again everyone!

I’m a sports media graduate student currently developing a mock Nike-style women in sports marketing campaign as part of my storytelling and creative portfolio work.

This is a non-affiliated conceptual project (not officially connected to Nike), but it is designed to match the tone, visual style, and emotional storytelling of high-end sports brand campaigns.

The project is titled:
“She Was Never Just One Thing” 

It follows a multi-sport female athlete (soccer, basketball, football, taekwondo, boxing, hockey, etc.) and explores identity, pressure, and breaking athletic limitations.

I’m currently looking to collaborate with:
* Video editors (short-form + cinematic style)
* Assistant editors / post-production help
* Motion graphics / text designers
* Anyone interested in sports storytelling / branded content

This is a portfolio-building collaboration project
All contributors will receive:
* Full creative credit
* Portfolio / reel usage rights
* Tagging in final release
* Shared exposure when posted across platforms (including tagging Nike)

I’ll also be linking my website + portfolio below.

If you’re interested in collaborating or want more details, feel free to shoot me an email at anaselenax@gmail.com

My website is anaselenax.com

Excited to build something powerful with other creatives  (I'll also be looking for any actors to fulfill this role, so ill be posting this on different facebook acting groups- any help is genuinely appreciated)

items.text:
Hello, I’m Luciana. I’m all about genuine connections, real energy, and showing up fully as myself on camera. 

I’ve appeared on Good Morning Britain, spoken at the Global Halal Brazil Business Forum, and built a community of over 84k on TikTok. 

I’m confident, expressive, and naturally connect with people, whether I’m speaking, presenting, or creating content.

I bring a warm, vibrant presence with a touch of Latina flair, people feel it, and they remember it.

I’m based in the UK and available for travel. I speak Portuguese and English fluently, with conversational Spanish. 

I’m a great fit for presenter roles, lifestyle content, relatable storytelling, and brand work.

Open to casting and collaborations.

items.text:
Principal Performer Roles are Now Open for our London and Manchester Shows! 

To apply, head to the LaplandUK website → Behind the Magic → Work for Us

Or follow this link - https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace

Please Note: This includes all Principal Elves and Mother Christmas. Applications for Father Christmas and Ensemble Roles will be opening very soon. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle. Please see attached our Character Descriptions which provide further details.

Putting families at the centre of the storyline, the 4/5 hour experience allows families to explore an ancient Elven civilisation through an enchanting world of storytelling that fuses the spectacle of a filmset with the performance of theatre.

We now present two simultaneous productions, welcoming families to experience the magic in both the South and the North of England.

Production Details:

Lapland London Location
Whitmoor Forest, Swinley Road, Winkfield Row, Ascot, SL5 8BD

Lapland Manchester Location 
Congleton Rd, Siddington, Macclesfield SK11 9JY

Lapland London Dates:

Lapland London Rehearsal, Tech & Dress Dates: Between Sept - Oct 2026

Lapland London Opening Day: 7th Nov 2026

Lapland London End of Contract: 24th Dec 2026

Lapland Manchester Dates:

Lapland Manchester Rehearsal, Tech & Dress Dates: Between Sept – Oct 2026

Lapland Manchester Opening Day: 7th Nov 2026

Lapland Manchester End of Contract: 24th Dec 2026

 
Audition Details:

London Audition Location: 

Pineapple Dance Studios, 7 Langley St, London WC2H 9JA 

London Audition Dates: 

16th - 17th April 2026

20th - 24th April 2026

27th April – 1st May 2026

Manchester Audition Location: 

Royal Exchange Theatre, Saint Ann's Square, Manchester M2 7DH 

Manchester Audition Dates: 

5th - 8th May 2025

11th - 15th May 2025  

Requirements: Must be at least 18 years of age and have the right to work in the UK.

We strongly encourage performers of all body types and appearances, abilities, disabilities, neurodiversity, ethnicities, ages, sexual orientations, gender identities, gender expressions, religions and socioeconomic backgrounds to audition.

For Lapland London, you must be prepared to travel or relocate to Ascot or the surrounding area. 

For Lapland Manchester, you must be prepared to travel or relocate to Macclesfield or the surrounding area. 

You must be available for all Rehearsal, Tech, Dress and Live Show Dates, between September – December. 

Contract Details:

Contract Type: Paid Contract PAYE

Principal Performer Hourly Pay: £20.00 + Monthly Subsidy

Rehearsal Day Rate: £160 / Technical Rehearsal Day Rate: £180 / Minimum Live Show Day Rate: £240

Principal Performer Weekly Subsidy: £300 (Paid Monthly in Addition to Hourly Pay)

The weekly subsidy is payable from the commencement of the contract and is paid each week for the duration of the contract. It is not conditional upon work being performed in any given week. 

All of the above fees will be treated as taxable income. 

Included, performers receive: 

1 hour paid costume & preparation time at the start of the day
30 minutes paid costume, wig and makeup removal at the end of the day
All breaks are fully paid
One on-site meal provided per shift
Unlimited Tea and Coffee throughout your shift
20% discount in Lapland retail shops on selected dates
 

Working Structure & Performer Wellbeing

Rehearsal days are 8 hours, including a 1 hour lunch break. 

Technical rehearsals and dress runs are 9 hours, including a 1 hour lunch break. 

While the live show day spans 12-12.5 hours, active performance time is carefully structured to prioritise wellbeing and performance consistency. Principal Performers live show schedule should run on 3 days on, 3 days off. 

The live show day operates on a consistent 1 hour on / 1 hour off rotation for Scripted Characters (2 shows on, 2 shows off). Roaming Characters follow a similar rotation, creating a balanced rhythm that allows for meaningful recovery time between performance blocks. This ensures substantial paid downtime throughout the day.

The Immersive Format 

The journey begins with a 90-minute scripted performance, narrative-driven immersive theatrical experience. While incorporating elements of improvisation and full interaction with the audience, performers are expected to honour the material and adhere to scripted elements consistently.

Performances 

Our experience operates with 21 tours departing consistently throughout the day, requiring Actors with significant stamina to maintain performance quality while ensuring each show remains both consistent and engaging for our guests. Principal roles also demand flexibility to balance repetition with a fresh, natural delivery. As a result, full working days are expected rather than just evening performances, which is why we follow a 3 day-on, 3 day-off schedule. Actors will deliver approximately 12 performances a day.

Duties

Given the multisensory nature of our show, Actors may be required to undertake duties that are not typically requested of them. These tasks are integral to the guest journey, enabling us to maintain authenticity and immersion in the experience. Additionally, the show boasts a high production value, as part of their daily duty, Actors are expected to respect and work with the West End Professionals in our Wardrobe and WHAM teams to ensure their costumes and wigs are taken care of to the highest standard to help preserve the integrity of our world.

Most roles in the experience entail fulfilling various technical functions to ensure the smooth operation of the production. This involves triggering cues, resetting props and small set pieces, and adhering to show times diligently. Performers will enact their scenes numerous times throughout the day, it is important all follow the script thoroughly, while also injecting

If you have any questions, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us at show@lapland.group

Please share with anyone you think would love to join us in making memories ✨

items.summary:
Principal Performer Roles are Now Open for our London and Manchester Shows! 

To apply, head to the LaplandUK website → Behind the Magic → Work for Us

Or follow this link - https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace

Please Note: This includes all Principal Elves and Mother Christmas. Applications for Father Christmas and Ensemble Roles will be opening very soon. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle. Please see attached our Character Descriptions which provide further details.

Putting families at the centre of the storyline, the 4/5 hour experience allows families to explore an ancient Elven civilisation through an enchanting world of storytelling that fuses the spectacle of a filmset with the performance of theatre.

We now present two simultaneous productions, welcoming families to experience the magic in both the South and the North of England.

items.text:
NABÓR - ZESPÓŁ TANECZNY DO MUSICALU „MAŁY KSIĄŻĘ” - ostatnie miejsca! 

Szukamy zdolnych dzieci i młodzieży do udziału w musicalu "Mały Książę - droga do zrozumienia" wystawianym 21 maja w Akademii Muzycznej w Gdańsku.

Wymagania: 
- Umiejętności taneczne lub gimnastyczne 
- Wiek od 8 - 15 lat 
- Dyspozycyjność (próby dwa razy w tygodniu w Gdańsku) od zaraz 
- Zaangażowanie 

Z naszej strony oferujemy:
- Profesjonalne warsztaty taneczne oraz aktorskie 
- Możliwość wystąpienia na prestiżowej scenie 
- Pracę w przyjaznym zespole z osobami doświadczonymi w pracy z dziećmi 

Naszym celem jest danie możliwość wystąpienia młodym osobom, które tak jak my kochają teatr i chcą być częścią czegoś wyjątkowego 😊 

Osoby zainteresowane zapraszamy do kontaktu na adres e-mail: teatrgarden@gmail.com lub do napisania w wiadomości prywatnej ✉️

items.text: Córka ma 10 lat . Uwielbia odgrywać rolę różnych postaci . Nie wstydzi się , jest kontaktowa. Chętnie uczy się nowych ról ..im trudne sprawy , reklamy produktów 🙂 Proszę o oferty . Jesteśmy z jeleniej ale dojedziemy gdzie trzeba ?

topComments.text: Proszę zapisać do sprawdzonej agencji. Pisanie I ofery na takich stronach, dla dziecka, to proszenie się o kłopoty. Agencja Edwin z Wrocławia jest sprawdzona agencja. Zgrani - agencja aktorska też. Lepiej bezpieczniej i pewniej

items.text:
KarrideoTV, founded by Christian Weiße, shows you in this channel trailer what this channel is truly about: mindset, business, technology, performance, travel, documentaries, interviews, and stories with real substance. 

Welcome to KarrideoTV, your channel for MINDSET, BUSINESS, Tech, PERFORMANCE, Finance, LIFESTYLE, TRAVEL, stories, and powerful perspectives from business, everyday life, innovation, and the human experience. 

This is not just a random collection of videos. Here, you will find journalistic reports, interviews, expert knowledge, personal experiences, documentary insights, and content that delivers genuine value. KarrideoTV brings together information, emotion, and relevance in videos designed to inspire, educate, and spark new ways of thinking. 

MINDSET stands for motivation, personality, success-driven thinking, and personal growth. BUSINESS, Finance, and Tech explore companies, innovation, the economy, engineering, mechanical industry, production, and modern technologies. PERFORMANCE focuses on health, sport, energy, and mental clarity. LIFESTYLE and TRAVEL combine journeys, remarkable places, enjoyment, animals, and striking visual impressions. Stories and documentaries highlight people, topics, and moments with depth, perspective, and authenticity. 

If you are looking on YouTube for content that does more than entertain, content that moves you forward professionally, personally, and mentally, you are in the right place. KarrideoTV is made for people who want more than fast consumption. It is for those seeking orientation, inspiration, insight, and perspectives that truly matter. 

Subscribe to KarrideoTV and explore the playlist that best fits your life, your mindset, or your business. 

Which topics interest you most right now: mindset, business, technology, travel, documentaries, or personal stories? 

Turn on the notification bell for new interviews, reports, expert voices, and strong perspectives. 

Share this channel trailer with people who are looking for more on YouTube than pure distraction. 

Christian Weiße, founder of Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion and Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner  

#KarrideoTV #Mindset #Business #Tech #Stories

items.summary:
KarrideoTV, founded by Christian Weiße, shows you in this channel trailer what this channel is truly about: mindset, business, technology, performance, travel, documentaries, interviews, and stories with real substance. 

Welcome to KarrideoTV, your channel for MINDSET, BUSINESS, Tech, PERFORMANCE, Finance, LIFESTYLE, TRAVEL, stories, and powerful perspectives from business, everyday life, innovation, and the human experience. 

This is not just a random collection of videos. Here, you will find journalistic reports, interviews, expert knowledge, personal experiences, documentary insights, and content that delivers genuine value. KarrideoTV brings together information, emotion, and relevance in videos designed to inspire, educate, and spark new ways of thinking. 

MINDSET stands for motivation, personality, success-driven thinking, and personal growth. BUSINESS, Finance, and Tech explore companies, innovation, the economy, engineering, mechanical industry, production, and modern technologies. PERFORMANCE focuses on health, sport, energy, and mental clarity. LIFESTYLE and TRAVEL combine journeys, remarkable places, enjoyment, animals, and striking visual impressions. Stories and documentaries highlight people, topics, and moments with depth, perspective, and authenticity. 

If you are looking on YouTube for content that does more than entertain, content that moves you forward professionally, personally, and mentally, you are in the right place. KarrideoTV is made for people who want more than fast consumption. It is for those seeking orientation, inspiration, insight, and perspectives that truly matter. 

Subscribe to KarrideoTV and explore the playlist that best fits your life, your mindset, or your business. 

Which topics interest you most right now: mindset, business, technology, travel, documentaries, or personal stories? 

Turn on the notification bell for new interviews, reports, expert voices, and strong perspectives. 

Share this channel trailer with people who are looking for more on YouTube than pure distraction. 

Christian Weiße, founder of Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion and Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner  

#KarrideoTV #Mindset #Business #Tech #Stories

items.text:
Liebe Filmemacher & Schauspieler, 

Wusstet ihr, dass sich auch die größten Schauspiellegenden regelmäßig coachen lassen? Doch nicht nur Schauspielcoaches sind populär... Auch Coaching für Drehbuchautoren und Regisseure werden immer präsenter. Vor allem in einer Zeit, in der am Set immer weniger geprobt wird. 

https://youtu.be/7B4lrd8Gq9c

Spannender Impuls von der Schauspielagentin Andrea Lambsdorff (Albrecht Schuch, Paula Beer, Tobias Moretti, etc.)

🎬 CASTING CALL: IDENTICAL TWINS (GIRLS, 10–12)

We’re scouting identical twin girls across South Africa for an upcoming paid feature film shooting in Cape Town (June–September 2026).

✨ Requirements:
• Identical twin girls
• Ages 10–12
• Mixed race / ethnically ambiguous look
• Must have a valid SA or international passport (travel to Belgium required)

This is an exciting international opportunity for young talent to be part of a major production 🌍

📩 To apply:
Email: studio@zestcasting.com

Include:
• Recent photos of both twins
• Names & ages
• Contact details
• Where they are based

⏰ Deadline: 13 April 2026

Tag parents, friends, schools, or agents who might know the perfect twins! 

#twins #southafrica #casting #featurefilm #capetowncasting #zestcasting

**DOMÓWKA SENIORÓW  ****#płatne**** **

Cześć! Do sesji promocyjnej w klimacie imprezy na działce szukam energicznych i oryginalnych seniorów.

📍Zdjęcia 18/19.04 (sobota lub niedziela) - Warszawa/okolice

Poszukiwane role (60+):
1. Seniorka narratorka - stawka 450 zł
2. Seniorzy i seniorki epizodyści - stawka 250 zł
3. Seniorzy i seniorki statyści - stawka 150 zł

Zainteresowanych proszę o zgłoszenia w wiadomościach prywatnych z:
* aktualnymi zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki
* wizytówką
* demo/scenkę mówioną
* wiekiem
* wzrostem i wymiarami

‼️Company Update‼️

Please note that the email address (info@liverpoolfilm.com) is no longer active or monitored.

As part of our efforts to save resources and streamline our services, while continuing to deliver the same great quality products, we have moved to a new contact email.

Kindly direct all future enquiries to: liverpoolfilmin@gmail.com

We appreciate your understanding and look forward to filming with you soon.

Sincerely,
Kai Jolley 
Liverpool Film Initiative

user.name: Majestic Academy of Performing Arts & Dance - Chester

items.text:
We’re so excited for our Acting for Screen Workshop, which is now fully booked and starting tomorrow!

Just a quick reminder to please bring:
🥪 A packed lunch
💦 Water
If you have a Majestic uniform, please wear it.
For new students, please come dressed in black or as close to black as possible.

This workshop is based around a really exciting new project we’re currently developing. We haven’t shared it publicly yet as it’s still in the writing stage, so you’ll be among the first to explore the material with us.

We can’t wait to get started and work with you all over the two days.

See you tomorrow! 🎬

#ActingForScreen #TalentAgency #Chester #PerformingArts #ActingClasses

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'We re excited to welcome you to our ACTING FOR SCREEN PROFESSIONAL WORKSHOP Learn essential on- on-camera acting techniques Work with scripted scenes from an original t pilot Explore natural, grounded performance for screen Film selected scenes in professional setting This workshop is designed for actors who want to: Build confidence on camera Develop subtle, truthful performances Experience working on original screen material Scene work in pairs Direction & feedback On-camera filming experience Limited spaces available We' re looking forward to working with you. AJESTIC'

This workshop is based around a really exciting new project we’re currently developing. We haven’t shared it publicly yet as it’s still in the writing stage, so you’ll be among the first to explore the material with us.

We can’t wait to get started and work with you all over the two days.

See you tomorrow! 🎬

#ActingForScreen #TalentAgency #Chester #PerformingArts #ActingClasses
items.title: We’re so excited for our Acting for Screen Workshop, which is now fully booked and starting tomorrow!

items.text:
**Templariusze  poszukiwani !**

** **

**INTRO mini serialu pod 1940r.**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’ **poszukuje mężczyzny w **wieku 30 – 50 lat **o obwodzie **w klatce 95 – 105** z brodą do roli w 2 scenach rycerza templariuszy. Postać będzie nosić podobne zestawy jak na zdjęciu. Szukamy kogoś **z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej.**    **Prosimy o wysłanie aktualnych zdjęć** gdyż tylko takowe zgłoszenia będą rozpatrywane. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie, jest to ważny czynnik w wyborze kandydata jak również doświadczenie aktorskie ( nie koniecznie duże ). Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.

 

**Od czerwca 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

[https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g)

https://www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

** **

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

**Mini serial  1940 – ‘’ 2 podoficer Waffen SS  -  mężczyzna  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzny w wieku 30 – 40 do roli podoficera Waffen SS . Szukamy osoby bez zarostu oraz tatuaży na twarzy. Postać będzie mieć kwestie po niemiecku. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 1 2 tygodniowym.

items.text:
**Mroczne sesje**

 

Poszukuje kobiet w **wieku od 18**, górna granica nie ma znaczenia. Wykonuje sesje w stylu mrocznym wykorzystując różne gadżety i kostiumy. Szukam kobiet ,które nie boją się własnego ciała. Doświadczenie nie jest tu ważne.

Osoba zainteresowana powinna najlepiej mieszkać **w Gliwicach** lub okolicach ( Zabrze, Katowice chyba, że ktoś jest bardzo zainteresowany i mieszka dalej to też ok. z tym,że nie zwracam za bilety.) tak aby dojazd był krótki dla niej. Sesje wykonuje tylko w Gliwicach. Po sesji i obrobieniu zdjęć, zostaną one wysłane modelce do jej wykorzystania. **Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne**, umowa na zasadzie **TFP**

** **

**Zapraszam na stronę Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia i maxmodel lukus_wielki2**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.title: **Mroczne sesje**

items.text:
**JELENIA GÓRA / SZKLARSKA PORĘBA**

**Plan zdjęciowy – JESTED, CZECHY**

**13 -14 -15 kwietnia**

 

Do filmu fabularnego osadzonego w latach 70tych pod roboczym tytułem „Kosmonauta” o znanym Polaku, **szukam Statystów**:

 

**13 / 14 / 15 KWIETNIA:**

**- STAND IN – **szczupli mężczyźni do 180 cm. Na stand inach ustawia się światło zamiast aktorów

13.04 dojazd do Jested we własnym zakresie na 6:20. Tutaj szukam panów z autem, którzy zabiorą jeszcze jedną osobę. Szukam 2 panów.

14.04 i 15.04 – transport z Jeleniej Góry. Również w roli wojskowych.

**Stawka 220 zł za dzień + zwrot kosztów paliwa**

 

**14 i 15 KWIETNIA:**

 - **WOJSKOWI –** mężczyźni ok. 18-50 lat – **na 14 i 15 kwietnia **(może być 1 dzień lub 2)

Zapewniamy transport z Jeleniej Góry.

14.04 wyjazd o 4:00 rano. Zdjęcia do ok. 16:30. **Stawka 180 zł**

15.04 wyjazd o 12:00. Zdjęcia do ok. północy. **Stawka 180 zł**

 

**Płatności gotówką po planie.**

 

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

** **

**Wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

**MĘŻCZYŹNI:**

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy

obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką ,wygolone boki i kark, wycięte

wzorki na włosach oraz nienaturalne kolory oraz farbowane np. na czarny.

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko

 

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **JJ 14/15**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: **ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'POD TYTUŁEM agencja agencjacastingowa castingowa n'

items.title: Stunt Performer Casting Call!

items.text:
WESTWARD - Student western directed by Nico Guin
A teenage outlaw returns home with a “Wanted —Dead or Alive” poster bearing his face, forcing a silent, heartbreaking reunion with the mother he left behind before he walks into the sunset to face the consequences of a past he can’t escape.

Looking for an older, female actor to play the mother in this 2-3 minute silent western.

This character is in her 40’s or 50’s, is loving yet heartbroken and distraught at the sight of her outlaw son.

Roles are not paid or promised.

We will be shooting during the month of April, and￼ are pretty flexible as it should be only one set. If you are interested or have any questions, you can reach out to me ￼at 914900@dpsk12.net or 7202552717. Thank you!

CALL FOR EXTRAS! 

This is going to be a blast!  Join us for the filming of our big stage scene for our movie about the 1970s Colorado rock band SUGARLOAF. We need extras to be part of the concert crowd.

Project: I Got a Song - The Story of Sugarloaf

Date: April 20, 2026

Location: Asterisk - 1075 Park Avenue West, Denver, CO

Time: Arrival 4:30-6pm. End 10pm

Attire: Late 60s/early 70s (no Halloween costumes please)

Dinner and drinks provided

Sign Up Here: https://sugarloafmovie.com/extras-sign-up

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL 🎭
Für ein No-Budget Comedy/Sci-Fi Kurzfilmprojekt rund um eine etwas chaotische Engels-WG suchen wir noch motivierte Schauspieler:innen!  

📍 Drehort: Nürnberg + ca. 60 km Umgebung  

Wenn du aus der Region kommst – oder bereit bist, für Proben und Drehs auch mal etwas Strecke auf dich zu nehmen – melde dich gern! Da wir uns regelmäßig treffen, ist eine gewisse Verfügbarkeit wichtig.  

Egal ob mit Erfahrung oder einfach Leidenschaft fürs Schauspiel:  

Wir freuen uns auf dich! ✨  

📩 Schreib mir einfach eine Nachricht für mehr Infos.

Lige færdig med at forberede min antiinflammatoriske flydende guld til ugen. Siden jeg begyndte at drikke den, er mine ledsmerter nede, og min energi er i topform.
Ikke mere morgenstivhed, og min mave føles fantastisk!
Hvem vil have hele opskriften? Skriv et "JA" i kommentarerne, så deler jeg præcis, hvad der er indeni.

items.text:
Hi everyone! 😊
I’m the founder of a mother model agency based in Berlin.

schatzmodels.com

I specialize in scouting models aged 15 to 23:
• girls — from 170 cm+
• boys — from 184 cm+

My focus is international modeling in Europe and Asia 🌍

You can apply by sending an email. No experience or portfolio is required — the main thing is to meet the criteria and be open to new opportunities ✨

Warm regards,

Varvara

items.text:
Stunt-Trained Actress Kirstin Weiser actionactress casting video 

Kirstin Weiser presents an intense trailer excerpt here from a much larger action trailer that is still being edited. You are seeing a scene full of pressure, attack energy and presence, performed directly toward the camera and the viewer. 

This video does not show a finished full trailer, but a single excerpt from a larger trailer project with Kirstin Weiser that is currently still in the editing process. That is exactly what makes this moment so exciting, because even this one scene already carries the precise energy that matters in action, crime and thriller. 

Kirstin Weiser runs toward her opponent with an iron rod, toward the camera and therefore directly toward the viewer. This instantly creates pressure, threat, tempo and a strong physical presence. It is exactly this direct attack dynamic that makes the scene cinematically effective and interesting for casting, production and directing. 

Kirstin Weiser is a versatile actress who should be considered far beyond action, crime and thriller. She moves convincingly, expressively and powerfully on camera in almost every facet, and can carry toughness, emotion, vulnerability, tension and presence with equal strength. This exact versatility makes her especially valuable for casting, directing and production, because Kirstin is not limited to one type, but is an exciting strong choice for different genres and role profiles. 

Anyone looking for actresses for intense, conflict-driven and physically demanding roles will get a first clear impression here of Kirstin’s impact. This clip is deliberately meant as a preview of the larger trailer that is currently still being worked on. 

If you are looking for strong female profiles for action, crime or thriller, this is already worth watching now. 

Write in the comments which format this scene works best for in your view: action film, crime series or thriller? 

Subscribe to the channel if you want to see the final trailer as well, and share this excerpt with people in casting, directing or production. 

In which genre does this trailer excerpt work most strongly for you: classic action film, dark thriller or hard TV crime drama? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#KirstinWeiser #TrailerExcerpt #ActionTrailer #Crime #Thriller

items.text:
Ralf Scharrer und ich, wenn Erfahrung sichtbar wird - Wo Bühne, Buch, Kamera und Verantwortung einander begegnen 

Wenn Haltung auf Begegnung trifft 

Dieses Foto zeigt für mich weit mehr als nur ein Interviewmoment. Es zeigt meine Begegnung mit Ralf Scharrer, einem Menschen, der Schauspiel, Schreiben, Design, Moderation und gesellschaftliches Engagement auf besondere Weise verbindet. Genau dort entsteht auch für mich als Christian Weiße ein echter Sinn, weil mediale Arbeit dann besonders wertvoll wird, wenn sie Haltung trägt. 

Vom Erleben zum Erzählen 

Ralf Scharrer steht für Mut, Wandel und Verantwortung. Seine Lesungen, seine Radio Show, Scharrer TV, sein Buch Dem Wahnsinn entkommen und seine Arbeit mit Aktiv gegen Stalking machen deutlich, dass er nicht nur sichtbar sein will, sondern etwas bewegen möchte. Aus persönlichen Tiefschlägen hat er eine öffentliche Kraft gemacht, die anderen Orientierung, Trost und Mut geben kann. 

Wo sein Weg und mein Tun sich verbinden 

Genau hier erkenne ich die Symbiose zwischen uns. Ich arbeite seit Jahren mit Kamera, Interviews, Storytelling, Filmproduktion, Social Media und redaktioneller Sichtbarkeit. Ralf bringt Inhalte mit Tiefe, Erfahrung und gesellschaftlicher Relevanz, ich bringe die mediale Umsetzung, das Gespür für Wirkung und die Fähigkeit mit, solche Themen glaubwürdig nach außen zu tragen. 

Wenn aus Inhalt Wirkung wird 

So wird aus einem gemeinsamen Foto mehr als Erinnerung. Es wird zu einem Zeichen dafür, wie Kunst, Unternehmergeist, Aufklärung und mediale Reichweite zusammenfinden können. Ralf gibt Themen Stimme, ich helfe dabei, dass diese Stimme gesehen, gehört und weitergetragen wird. Genau in solchen Begegnungen liegt für mich der wahre Sinn meiner Arbeit. 

Welche Themen mit echter Haltung und persönlicher Tiefe sollten heute aus Deiner Sicht viel stärker öffentlich erzählt werden? 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeiße #AktivGegenStalking #Storytelling #Karrideo

items.text:
**CALL FOR VOICES: Immigrant Actors in the UK**

Hi everyone! I’m an anthropology master’s student at UCL working on a creative research project.

I’m looking to better understand the lived experience of immigrant actors in the UK.  If you’re an international actor aged 18+, I’d really love to hear your perspective!

To take part, you just answer three simple questions.
Even a few lines is enough.

No pressure - it can be raw, messy, poetic, funny, honest. You can respond in writing or via voice note, and you can choose to remain anonymous.

You’re also invited (completely optional) to share something creative that captures your experience - a poem, photo, drawing, monologue, dance, or anything else.

**That’s it.**

Your response will become part of a multivoiced digital artwork / exhibition built from real lived experiences.

If you’d like to take part, please follow the link below.
items.title: Voices from Another Stage🎤

items.text:
HERE’S WHY EVERYONE IS TALKING ABOUT ‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ THE PLAY RIGHT NOW…
‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ IS BEING ASSESSED FOR AN OFFIE NOMINATION!!!

ONLY ONE WEEK RUN LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL & REAL PLAY BASED ON TRUE EVENTS!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here - SELLING FAST!

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS JUST £12.50 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

CAST 

@theflyingscotsmann 

@phoenixbenhamactor 

@fynphoenixx 

@em_jsmith 

@sebastianvscott 

@esmepemburysmith 

@jonnymonk800m

ASSISTANT DIRECTOR/STAGE MANAGER - @ermydecarvalho 

FOOTAGE BY - @jason_perryman 

PHOTOS BY - @build.better.stories

ONLY ONE WEEK RUN LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL & REAL PLAY BASED ON TRUE EVENTS!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here - SELLING FAST!

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS JUST £12.50 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

Feature Film shooting a scene for Proof of Concept. 

 

80' Retro Punk and New Wave Looks

 

Synopsis - Ollie (Lead Character) walks into his shared apartment to find two uninvited guests. 

 

ALL ACTORS must have a Punk look or be willing to change their hair. 

 

Sabrina - Female - 18-26 - white/hispanic - obnoxious, loud

Snotrocket - Male - 20-32 - white/hispanic - abrasive, crude 

Levi - Male - 20-26 - white - square, nerdy 

Paid (negotiable), meal provided. 

 

Send an actor resume with headshot and video. We will get back to those submissions that generate interest. 

 

Austin, TX 

May 5th or 11th shoot date. TBD on DP availability. 

 

1 day of filming. Arri Alexa Mini LF video on 70's cinematic Cooke lenses. 

 

Proof of concept for investment solicitation to develop a feature film. Attached pics are stills from a previous shoot for the same project. 

 

Send all submissions to:

[thehoot@gmail.com](mailto:thehoot@gmail.com)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM (UNPAID | PORTFOLIO PROJECT)**
**Project Title:** *Memory Unwritten*
**Role:** Lead – Peter (Male, 22–28)
**Location:** Toronto / GTA
**Production Type:** Experimental Narrative Portfolio Short Film
**Compensation:** Unpaid (Food, Credits, Footage Provided)

Memory Unwritten is a cinematic, character-driven short film exploring identity, memory loss, and emotional rebirth. 
**This project is intended for emerging talent who is willing to commit to work on an experimental test dramatic role.**
Designed as a high-quality portfolio piece, this project focuses on subtle, internal performance and visual storytelling.

**Logline**: A young man with memory loss struggles to connect with the person he used to be, but a chance encounter with a stranger helps him realize that his identity isn’t defined by his past—only by the choices he makes moving forward.

**IDEAL CANDIDATE**
* Male, age range 23–26
* Recent film/drama graduate or emerging actor preferred
* Strong interest in cinematic/indie storytelling
* Able to collaborate in a creative, experimental environment

**Dates**: TBD (Flexible scheduling over a few days) Location: Toronto & Scarborough areas Style: Cinematic, natural light, handheld + composed frames Tone: Grounded, introspective, emotionally immersive

**WHAT YOU GET**
* High-quality footage for your demo reel
* Film credit (upon completion) & Food provided
* Creative collaboration with a small crew building a cinematic portfolio
* Opportunity to explore a nuanced, lead role

**HOW TO APPLY**
Please submit through email: reddybry8films@gmail.com
* Headshot
* Resume (if available)
* Demo reel, self-tape(casual) or recent work links timestamps -mandatory 

**NOTE**
**My prev work : **[http://www.youtube.com/@reddybry8films](http://www.youtube.com/@reddybry8films)
This project is emotion-driven, hearty and cinematic. If you’re interested in exploring a character through silence, and subtle emotional shifts rather than dialogue-heavy scenes, this role is for you.

**Let’s create something honest, experimental, and cinematic.**

items.text:
📍LA
Hi everyone,

We’re currently casting background extras for Nevermind (proof of concept shoot) and are looking for a vibrant, mixed group of people in their 20s–30s to reflect an authentic LA vibe.

Shoot Dates: May 1–3 (flexible depending on role)

Location: Los Angeles

Roles: Background extras (various scenes)

We’re looking for natural, expressive faces and diverse personalities; artists, creatives, students, professionals, anyone who feels like they belong in the world of contemporary LA.

This is a great opportunity to be part of an intimate, character-driven project with a strong visual and emotional core.

If interested, please email:

rheadamani@gmail.com

(cc: himanginipuri@gmail.com)

Include:

– Name

– Age

– Headshots

– Availability for May 1–3

Looking forward to hearing from you!
